items.title: [WIP] Add desktop application interface for Axiom using Electron or PyQt
items.content:
Thanks for asking me to work on this. I will get started on it and keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make progress.


<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

Upgrade Axiom to include a desktop application interface so it can be run as a desktop app like OpenClaw, in addition to Discord. Implement a cross-platform desktop UI using Electron (for JavaScript/Node.js projects) or PyQt/Tkinter (for Python projects), depending on the language used in the repo. The desktop app should:
1. Allow the user to send tasks and chat with the AI agent (the same as DMing on Discord).
2. Display the AI responses and (optionally) logs of tool actions.
3. Provide an area to enter tasks, view history, and show connection status to Groq and Discord.
4. Document in the README how to launch/build the desktop version on Windows, Mac, and Linux, as well as how to use both the Discord and desktop versions side by side.

The following is the prior conversation context from the user's chat exploration (may be truncated):

Assistant: Yes, exactly! I am writing the actual code for the app right now. 

Behind the scenes, the coding agent is:
1. Setting up the project files (like `package.json` or `requirements.txt`).
2. Writing the code for the Discord bot so it can log in and listen to your messages.
3. Writing the integration code to connect the bot to an AI brain (like OpenAI's API) so it can understand what you're saying and figure out how to respond or act.
4. Putting all of this into a Pull Request in your `kickxly-dev/Axiom` repository.

If you click the link I sent in the previous message, you can actually watch the code being written and added to your repo in real-time! Once I'm finished, you'll be able to review the code, merge it, and then run the app on your computer or a server. 

Let me know if there are specific commands or "actions" you want the brain to be able to do right out of the box!

User: ok keep foims

items.title: feat(tasks): harden maintenance repair paths
items.content:
## Summary

- Problem: task maintenance still left one repair gap: tasks marked `lost` did not get `cleanupAfter` until a later pass, and `status` surfaced audit errors without telling operators the repair command.
- Why it matters: repair drift keeps old broken rows around longer than intended and makes task health actionable only if the operator already knows the maintenance CLI.
- What changed: maintenance now stamps `cleanupAfter` in the same pass that marks a task `lost`, inspection-time lost projections mirror that retention, and `openclaw status` prints a direct maintenance hint when task audit errors are present.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no executor changes, no task schema expansion, no Redis/Temporal work, no producer-specific lifecycle refactors.

- Root cause: task maintenance reconciled `lost` state and retention in two separate passes.
- Missing detection / guardrail: there was no test asserting that a newly-lost task gets `cleanupAfter` immediately.
- Prior context (`git blame`, prior PR, issue, or refactor if known): follow-up to the task maintenance/status work in #57423.
- Why this regressed now: the initial maintenance pass optimized for state reconciliation first and cleanup stamping second.

items.title: fix(memory): rebind qmd collections on pattern drift
items.content:
## Summary

- Problem: `shouldRebindCollection()` returned early when QMD collection metadata omitted `path`, so pattern changes in `memory.qmd.paths[].pattern` were silently ignored on restart.
- Why it matters: operators could change config, restart successfully, and still keep the stale old collection pattern with no visible correction.
- What changed: check pattern drift before the missing-path guard, and keep the old non-destructive behavior only for truly metadata-incomplete name-only rows.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): collection creation semantics, path-based rebind logic when path metadata exists, and the current non-destructive handling for collection-name-only list output.

items.title: Gateway dashboard UI Save wipes entire openclaw.json config, resetting provider keys, models, channels, and all settings
items.content:
## Critical Bug: UI Config Save destroys entire configuration

**Severity:** Critical / Data loss

**Summary:**
Pressing Save on the Agents overview page in the gateway dashboard wipes the entire `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` config, leaving only `meta`, `agents`, `commands`, and `gateway` keys. All other settings are destroyed including:
- All provider API keys (`auth`, `models`, `env`)
- Channel config (Telegram, etc.)
- Plugin settings
- Tool settings
- Hooks config
- TTS config
- Browser config

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Open gateway dashboard → Agents
2. Make any change in the Overview tab (e.g. change primary model)
3. Press Save

**Result:**
Config is wiped to a near-empty state. The agent falls back to Anthropic (the default provider) even if Anthropic has never been configured. Every provider, channel, and plugin setting is lost.

**Expected:**
Only the modified agent setting should be saved. Other config keys should be untouched.

**Impact:**
This has caused complete loss of working configuration requiring restore from backup. The fallback to Anthropic after the wipe is particularly confusing since Anthropic was never set up — every update that touches this code path risks destroying user config.

**Additional context:**
The `config-audit.jsonl` confirms multiple config writes during the UI save event. The backup at `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.bak` was the only recovery path.
items.author: fwends

items.title: fix(chat): hide internal system messages from webchat
items.content:
Fixes #707

## Problem

After a gateway restart, internal plumbing messages are temporarily visible in the chat window:
- Gateway restart notification (system role)
- Heartbeat poll prompt (system role)
- Agent's `HEARTBEAT_OK` response (assistant role)
- Agent's `NO_REPLY` response (assistant role)

These are backend internals that should never be shown to users.

## Solution

Filter out internal messages before rendering:

1. **System role messages** — all `role === 'system'` messages are internal OpenClaw plumbing (heartbeat prompts, gateway notifications)
2. **Ack-only assistant messages** — messages where the text content is exactly `HEARTBEAT_OK` or `NO_REPLY` (agent acknowledgment responses)

Normal assistant messages that happen to *contain* these strings as substrings are preserved.

## Changes

- `src/stores/chat/helpers.ts`: Add `isInternalMessage()` helper
- `src/stores/chat/history-actions.ts`: Apply filter in history loading
- `src/stores/chat.ts`: Apply same filter in legacy code path
- `tests/unit/chat-history-actions.test.ts`: 4 new tests

## Tests

```
✓ tests/unit/chat-history-actions.test.ts (6 tests) 36ms
```

items.author: bbbyk105

items.title: fix: register agent in openclaw.json config when spawning root agent from UI
items.content:
## What 
Automatically registers a new agent in the OpenClaw config when Nerve creates a session and workspace for it.

## Why 
Agents created through Nerve had a workspace and sessions on disk but were not registered in openclaw.json. This made them invisible to the CLI — they couldn't have routing rules (e.g. Telegram bindings), per-agent config overrides, or show up in openclaw agents list. The fix needed to happen at agent creation time, not as a manual follow-up step.

## How 
Before the existing sessions.patch call in SessionProvider, we now call agents.create via RPC with the agent's name and the standard workspace path (~/.openclaw/workspace-<agentId>). The call is placed before sessions.patch so the agent config exists when sessions.patch resolves the session's model — otherwise it falls back to global defaults instead of picking up any agent-specific model configuration. Errors are swallowed if the agent is already registered, so this is safe to call on every session creation without side effects.

~9 line change in SessionContext.tsx, plus a regression test verifying agents.create is called during root agent spawn.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Tests**
  * Added test case verifying session spawning triggers agent creation via backend RPC call.

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Enhanced root session spawning with agent creation logic and error handling for existing agents.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

items.author: smurf-bot[bot]

items.title: fix: strip OpenClaw metadata noise and improve ingest stability
items.content:
## Problem

When using mem9 with OpenClaw, the ingest pipeline fails to extract meaningful facts because:

1. **Metadata noise** — OpenClaw injects large metadata blocks into every message (Conversation info, Inbound Context, Sender, Group Chat Context, message_id, `<relevant-memories>`, HEARTBEAT_OK, NO_REPLY). These consume the LLM's input budget and add no value for fact extraction.

2. **Only extracting from user messages** — Many valuable facts appear in assistant replies (software installed, configurations changed, decisions made, issues resolved).

3. **JSON instability with small local models** — Ollama's qwen3.5:9b sometimes returns invalid JSON when using `response_format: { type: "json_object" }`, causing silent extraction failures.

4. **Excessive input length** — With metadata noise, conversations easily exceed 1M characters, causing small models to produce unreliable output.

## Changes

### Server (`internal/service/ingest.go`)
- Add `stripMemoryTags`: regex-based removal of OpenClaw metadata blocks, message_id lines, HEARTBEAT_OK, NO_REPLY
- Reduce conversation truncation from 1,000,000 to 8,000 characters (appropriate for small models)
- Switch from `extractFactsAndTags` to `extractFacts` for simpler, more reliable JSON output
- Update extraction prompt to extract from BOTH user and assistant messages

### LLM Client (`internal/llm/client.go`)
- Add `json.Valid` check on LLM response; if invalid, retry without `response_format`
- Remove duplicate `return` on HTTP 400 path

### Plugin (`openclaw-plugin/hooks.ts`)
- Add matching metadata stripping in plugin-side `stripInjectedContext`

## Testing

Verified end-to-end with Ollama qwen3.5:9b:
- Conversation reduced from ~1M chars of noise to ~6,500 chars of actual content
- Successfully extracted 9 facts and reconciled with 14 existing memories
- JSON retry mechanism handles Ollama's occasional invalid output

## Environment

- GPU: RTX 4060 Ti 16GB
- LLM: Ollama qwen3.5:9b
- Embedding: Ollama qwen3-emb

items.author: bbbyk105

items.title: Feature: Add navigation tools (back, forward, refresh)
items.content:
# Feature: Add navigation tools

## Summary

Adds three OpenClaw tools for browser history navigation, completing feature parity between the REST API and OpenClaw plugin.

## New Tools

### `camofox_back`
Navigate back in browser history.
```typescript
{ tabId: string }
```

### `camofox_forward`
Navigate forward in browser history.
```typescript
{ tabId: string }
```

### `camofox_refresh`
Refresh the current page.
```typescript
{ tabId: string }
```

## Use Cases

- **Multi-page workflows** - Go back to previous page after form submission
- **Error recovery** - Refresh page after failed load
- **History traversal** - Explore navigation paths (e.g., browse product catalog)

## Examples

```javascript
// Agent workflow: fill form, submit, go back
await camofox_type({ tabId, ref: 'e1', text: 'user@example.com' });
await camofox_click({ tabId, ref: 'e2' }); // Submit button
await camofox_back({ tabId }); // Return to form

// Refresh stale page
await camofox_refresh({ tabId });

// Navigate forward after going back
await camofox_forward({ tabId });
```

## Technical Details

**REST API endpoints** (existed since v1.3.0):
- `POST /tabs/:tabId/back`
- `POST /tabs/:tabId/forward`
- `POST /tabs/:tabId/refresh`

**Implementation:**
- Tools call existing REST endpoints
- Client helper already had these methods
- No server changes required

## Testing

- ✅ All navigation e2e tests pass (5/5)
  - navigate to URL
  - navigate back
  - navigate forward
  - refresh page
  - navigation updates visited URLs
- ✅ Endpoints respond correctly
- ✅ Browser history works as expected

## Checklist

- [x] Tools added to plugin.ts
- [x] Tools follow existing patterns (navigate, close_tab)
- [x] Descriptions are clear
- [x] All e2e tests pass
- [x] No breaking changes
- [x] Feature parity achieved (REST API = OpenClaw tools)

items.title: [Bug]: agent kb returns hallucinated answers / pseudo-tool calls while memory search returns correct docs result
items.content:
### Bug type

Regression (worked before, now fails)

### Beta release blocker

No

### Summary

## Summary

`memory search` returns the correct local-doc result for my `kb` agent, but `openclaw agent --agent kb` does not reliably use that result.

Instead, the live agent turn may:
- return `No reply from agent`
- emit pseudo tool syntax like `[[memory_search]]`
- reference nonexistent files such as `.openclaw\memory\_kb\search_results.json`
- hallucinate conflicting answers that do not match the actual top memory hit

This appears to be a live agent turn / tool-result handoff problem, not a memory index problem.

## Version

Reproduced on:
- `2026.3.23-2`
- `2026.3.24`
- `2026.3.28`

## Environment

- Windows 10
- Gateway on loopback `127.0.0.1:18789`
- Chat model: `ollama/qwen3.5:9b`
- Embedding model: `qwen3-embedding:8b`

## Relevant agent config

```json id="nyc8k1"
{
  "id": "kb",
  "workspace": "D:\\AI\\AIHelpDoc\\openclaw-local\\workspace-kb",
  "model": "ollama/qwen3.5:9b",
  "memorySearch": {
    "enabled": true,
    "extraPaths": ["docs"],
    "provider": "ollama",
    "fallback": "none",
    "model": "qwen3-embedding:8b",
    "sync": { "watch": false }
  },
  "tools": {
    "profile": "minimal",
    "allow": ["memory_search", "memory_get", "read"]
  }
}

### Steps to reproduce

Repro
Put a canary doc in workspace-kb/docs/金丝雀问题.md with:
question: 1401中有几个人？
answer: 1401中有6个人。
Confirm backend search is correct:
openclaw memory search --agent kb "1401"

This correctly returns docs/金丝雀问题.md with 1401中有6个人。

Run the live agent turn:
openclaw agent --agent kb --timeout 60 -m "/new"
openclaw agent --agent kb --timeout 60 -m "1401中有几个人？如果找到了答案请附来源。"

### Expected behavior

Expected

The live agent should return:

1401中有6个人。来源：docs/金丝雀问题.md

### Actual behavior

Actual

Observed bad outcomes include:

No reply from agent
[[memory_search]]
[[read]] ...search_results.json
hallucinated answers like 19人, 20人, 23人
hallucinated source files like docs/1401_class_list.md

items.title: fix(facade-runtime): add recursion guard to facade module loader to prevent infinite stack overflow
items.content:
### Summary

- **Problem**: The `xai`, `sglang`, and `vllm` plugins crash on every load attempt with `RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded`. The gateway retries loading these plugins every ~8 minutes, each time hitting the same stack overflow. This occurs in `src/plugin-sdk/facade-runtime.ts` at `loadBundledPluginPublicSurfaceModuleSync()` (line 171-206).
- **Root Cause**: The facade lazy-loading pattern introduced in `8e0ab35b0e` handles function exports correctly (wrapped in closures, loaded on first call) but constant exports eagerly call `loadFacadeModule()` at module-evaluation time. When the constant initializer triggers `loadFacadeModule()` → Jiti sync load of `extensions/{xai,sglang,vllm}/api.ts`, any transitive dependency that imports back to `openclaw/plugin-sdk/{xai,sglang,vllm}` (even indirectly) re-enters `loadBundledPluginPublicSurfaceModuleSync()`. The `loadedFacadeModules` cache is only set **after** the Jiti load returns (line 204), so the re-entrant call finds no cache entry and recurses until stack overflow.
- **Fix**: Set a sentinel object in the `loadedFacadeModules` cache **before** the Jiti load begins. Re-entrant calls receive the sentinel instead of recursing. Once the real module finishes loading, the sentinel is populated via `Object.assign()` so any references obtained during the circular load phase see the real exports. This safely breaks the infinite recursion without changing the eager evaluation semantics of constant exports. The generic constraint `<T>` was also tightened to `<T extends object>` to ensure `Object.assign()` is type-safe.
- **What changed**: 
  - `src/plugin-sdk/facade-runtime.ts`: Added sentinel object logic in `loadBundledPluginPublicSurfaceModuleSync` and tightened generic constraint to `<T extends object>`.
  - `src/test-utils/bundled-plugin-public-surface.ts`: Propagated the `<T extends object>` constraint to `loadBundledPluginPublicSurfaceSync` and `loadBundledPluginTestApiSync`.
- **What did NOT

items.title: [Bug]: DingTalk connector gets 403 'missing scope: operator.write' when calling gateway API
items.content:
# [Bug]: DingTalk connector gets 403 "missing scope: operator.write" when calling gateway API

## Bug type
Regression (worked before, now fails) / Authentication issue

## Description
DingTalk connector successfully connects and creates AI Cards, but fails when calling the gateway streaming API (`/v1/chat/completions`) with error:
```
403 - {"ok":false,"error":{"type":"forbidden","message":"missing scope: operator.write"}}
```

## Environment
- **OpenClaw version**: 2026.3.28 (f9b1079)
- **DingTalk connector version**: 0.8.8
- **OS**: Windows 10.0.26200 (x64)
- **Node version**: 24.14.0
- **Gateway mode**: local (loopback)

## Configuration
```json5
{
  "gateway": {
    "port": 18789,
    "mode": "local",
    "bind": "loopback",
    "auth": {
      "mode": "token",
      "token": "e374f14b8f2a45425b1775b2fc7df7bd239c0860d409763f"
    }
  },
  "channels": {
    "dingtalk-connector": {
      "enabled": true,
      "clientId": "dingmtt4i1pr8byl530g",
      "clientSecret": "rLfKK1-F0dkPy3dG--msixBGyezpICJ0MOoWLMV2wS6SenUOoM2LQ9U3vkk1h1Rf",
      "gatewayToken": "e374f14b8f2a45425b1775b2fc7df7bd239c0860d409763f"
    }
  },
  "bindings": [
    {
      "type": "route",
      "agentId": "qa-engineer",
      "match": {
        "channel": "dingtalk-connector"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## Steps to reproduce
1. Configure DingTalk connector with gatewayToken matching gateway.auth.token
2. Start gateway: `openclaw gateway start`
3. Send a message to DingTalk bot
4. Observe AI Card is created successfully
5. Gateway API call fails with 403 error

## Expected behavior
DingTalk connector should be able to call gateway streaming API (`/v1/chat/completions`) successfully when authenticated with the correct gateway token.

## Actual behavior
- AI Card creation: ✅ Success (status=200)
- Gateway API call: ❌ 403 Forbidden
  ```
  [DingTalk][Gateway] POST http://127.0.0.1:18789/v1/chat/completions
  [DingTalk][Gateway] 响应 status=403, ok=false
  [DingTalk][Gateway] 错误响应: {"ok":false,"error":

items.title: fix: allow absolute paths for OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH and OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR in workspace .env
items.content:
## Summary

Fixes a regression introduced in 2026.3.28 where `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` and `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` were blocked from being loaded from a project-local `.env` file, even when set to absolute paths.

## Root Cause

PR #54631 added both keys to `BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS` to prevent malicious workspace files from redirecting config/state loading (e.g. `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=./evil-config.json`). However, this was overly broad and also blocked the legitimate user case of configuring these paths to absolute locations in a project `.env`.

## Fix

The security concern is specifically about **relative paths**, not absolute paths. Absolute paths are safe because they are explicitly configured by the user.

This PR introduces `ABSOLUTE_PATH_ONLY_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS` — a set of keys that are allowed from workspace `.env` only when the value is an absolute path. Relative path values for these keys remain blocked.

## Changes

- `src/infra/dotenv.ts`: Replace broad block on `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` / `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` with a value-aware check (`path.isAbsolute`) that only blocks relative paths
- `src/infra/dotenv.test.ts`: Add tests for both allowed (absolute path) and blocked (relative path) cases

## Testing

All existing tests pass. New tests added and verified:
- Allows absolute `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` and `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` from workspace `.env`
- Blocks relative `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` from CWD `.env`
- Blocks relative path values even when env vars are unset

Fixes #57408

items.title: 企业微信CLI开源项目发布,支持通过CLI使用接口能力
items.content: ### 1.企业微信支持CLI开源 企业微信 CLI 开源项目上架 Github 社区，开放企业微信消息、日程、文档、智能表格、会议、待办、通讯录等核心产品能力，支持主流 AI agent调用。 下载地址：[https://github.com/WecomTeam/wecom-cli](url) ### 2.CLI可使用的能力 应用 | 可执行的命令 -- | -- 💬消息 | 获取单聊、群聊消息，并可向指定用户和群聊发送消息 📄文档 | 新建、写入、读取文档 📊智能表格 | 新建、写入、读取智能表格 📅日程 | 新建、查询、更新日程，查看其他人的闲忙状态，添加日程的参与人员 💻会议 | 预定、查询、取消会议，添加参会人 ✅待办 | 创建待办任务，查询你指定时间内的待办列表、添加待办参与人、更改待办状态 👥通讯录 | 获取用户通讯录内的成员userid、姓名、备注信息 ### 3.如何安装使用CLI 3.1 环境要求 ●Node.js（npm/npx） ●企业微信机器人的 Bot ID 和 Secret，步骤如下： ① 登录企微，进入工作台，找到「智能机器人」，并点击「手动创建」； ② 选择 API 模式创建； ③ 连接方式选择「使用长连接」，即可获取并保存Bot ID 及Secret； ④ 配置可见成员，并完成权限授权，保存即可完成机器人创建。 3.2 安装 ``` # 安装 CLI npm install -g @wecom/cli # 安装 CLI SKILL（必需） npx skills add WeComTeam/wecom-cli -y -g ``` 3.3 快速开始 ``` # 1. 配置机器人凭证（仅需一次） wecom-cli init --botId "YOUR_BOT_ID" --secret "YOUR_BOT_SECRET" # 2. 查看支持的品类和能力 wecom-cli --help # 3. 列出某个品类下的所有工具 wecom-cli list contact # 4. 调用工具 wecom-cli call contact get_userlist '{}' ``` 3.4 包含的skills skill | 所属应用 | 说明 -- | -- | -- wecom-preflight | — | 前置条件检查，确保工具权限配置正确（所有其他 skill 自动依赖） wecom-contact-lookup | 通讯录 | 通讯录成员查询，按姓名/别名搜索 wecom-get-todo-list | 待办 | 待办列表查询，按时间过滤和分页 wecom-get-todo-detail | 待办 | 待办详情批量查询 wecom-edit-todo | 待办 | 待办创建、更新、删除、状态变更 wecom-meeting-create | 会议 | 创建预约会议 wecom-meeting-manage | 会议 | 取消会议、更新受邀成员 wecom-meeting-query | 会议 | 查询会议列表和详情 wecom-msg | 消息 | 会话列表、消息记录、媒体下载、文本发送 wecom-schedule | 日程 | 日程 CRUD、参与人管理、闲忙查询 wecom-doc-manager | 文档 | 文档创建/读取/编辑 wecom-smartsheet-schema | 文档 | 智能表格子表与字段管理 wecom-smartsheet-data | 文档 | 智能表格记录增删改查 wecom-send-media | — | 通过 MEDIA 指令向用户发送本地文件（仅限 wecom 通道） wecom-send-template-card | — | 发送结构化模板卡片消息（仅限 wecom 通道） 更多请参考GitHub使用文档 4.声明 ●使用要求：CLI的使用需要用户绑定长连接方式机器人的BOT id 和Secret授权。授权后机器人将以用户身份使用对应能力。同时为避免越权，授权了CLI能力的机器人将限制仅创建者可对话，其他成员不可使用。企业微信CLI目前优先对≤10人企业开放使用。 ●风险提示：由AI agent调用CLI操作企业微信内部应用，可能受模型幻觉等影响，存在数据泄露、越权等风险。建议在测试企业中先行验证后请谨慎使用，安装使用CLI后默认用户接受潜在风险。 5.其他指引

items.title: feat: Directory view redesign — icon sidebar + content panels
items.content:
## Summary

Complete redesign of the Directory Detail page from a vertical stack layout to a **60px icon sidebar + content panel** architecture.

### New Layout
- **60px icon sidebar** with 5 tabs: Sources, Quizzes, Flashcards, Slides, Rules
- **Content panel** that swaps content based on selected tab (React state, no route change)
- **Subfolder pills** with three-dot dropdown menu (Manage rules / Delete folder)
- **Clickable document titles** in source rows that navigate to `/document/:id`

### Commits (6)

| Commit | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `d1d6370` | Scaffold 7 new components for directory view redesign |
| `0afa529` | Rewrite DirectoryDetailPage with icon sidebar + content panel layout |
| `462fccc` | CodeRabbit fixes: rules filtering, accessibility, pointer events |
| `35a2746` | CodeRabbit fixes: reset panel on navigation, truncation warnings |
| `a7eb187` | Accessibility: make delete buttons accessible to touch and keyboard |
| `d248672` | Clickable document titles + subfolder pill three-dot menu |

### New Components (7)
- `DirectoryIconSidebar.tsx` — 60px icon sidebar (Sources, Quizzes, Cards, Slides, Rules)
- `SourcesPanel.tsx`, `SourceRow.tsx` — source list with inline Generate dropdown + hover delete
- `QuizzesPanel.tsx`, `FlashcardsPanel.tsx`, `SlidesPanel.tsx` — artifact lists with truncation warnings
- `RulesPanel.tsx` — directory-specific rules

### Key Design Decisions
- Sidebar panels **replace content** on same page (React state, no route change)
- Subfolder pills **navigate** to subdirectory
- **No artifacts** on source rows — only visible via sidebar tabs
- Rules show **directory-assigned only**
- Source rows show **minimal** metadata (title + word count + date)

### Accessibility
- Delete buttons visible on hover (mouse), focus-visible (keyboard), and always on touch devices (`@media (hover: none)`)
- `<nav aria-label="Directory content">` semantic structure
- Shadcn `Button` components instead of raw `<button>`

items.title: [agento] feat(blog): post_reaction MCP tool — Phase 2 worker upvotes/reactions
items.content:
## Background

Phase 2 feature for the living blog: enabling AI workers to upvote/react to posts. This allows worker-to-worker interaction signals on blog posts, enabling richer social dynamics across the AO worker ecosystem.

## Goals

- [x] Add `reactions: Record<string, string[]>` field to Post type
- [x] Implement `react_to_post` MCP tool with toggle semantics
- [x] Implement `get_reactions` MCP tool with summary view
- [x] 17 integration tests covering all code paths
- [x] Build passes, tests green

## Tenets

- Minimal schema change — reactions stored inline on the Post, no new storage entities
- Toggle semantics: same worker + same emoji = remove (idempotent, no double-add)
- Emoji key auto-cleanup when last worker un-reacts
- Cross-repo rejection with clear error
- Storage-agnostic — works with MemoryBlogStorage (no Firestore changes needed)

## High-level description of changes

### `src/shared/types.ts`
- Added `reactions?: Record<string, string[]>` to `Post` interface (emoji → workerIds)
- Added `reactions: z.record(...)` to `PostSchema` Zod validator

### `src/blog/tools.ts`
- `ReactToPostParamsSchema`: params = `{repoKey, postId, workerId, emoji}`
- `GetReactionsParamsSchema`: params = `{repoKey, postId}`
- `react_to_post` handler: validates post exists + repo match, toggles workerId in emoji list, persists via `storage.updatePost`, returns `{added, reactions}`
- `get_reactions` handler: returns raw reactions map + summary array + total count

### `tests/blog/reactions.test.ts`
17 tests covering:
1. Add a reaction
2. Multiple workers react with same emoji
3. Toggle off (same worker + emoji)
4. Multiple different emojis on same post
5. Emoji key cleanup when last worker un-reacts
6. get_reactions returns correct summary
7. get_reactions on fresh post (empty)
8. react_to_post — post not found
9. react_to_post — cross-repo rejection
10. get_reactions — cross-repo rejection
11. react_to_post — invalid UUID
12. react_to_post — invalid repoKey format
13. reac

items.author: github-actions[bot]

items.title: design: Voice + Claude Code bridge for Phone Jackie
items.content:
## Summary
- Design doc proposing an `ask_claude` tool for the voice service that delegates complex tasks to Claude Code CLI
- Bridges the capability gap between Phone Jackie (14 hardcoded tools) and Discord Jackie (full Claude Code toolkit)
- One tool gives Phone Jackie access to bash, MCP servers, skills, git, file system, and everything else Claude Code can do

## Test plan
- [ ] Review design doc for architectural soundness
- [ ] Validate the `ask_claude` approach handles latency concerns (system prompt tells GPT to say "let me check" before calling)
- [ ] Confirm alternatives were properly evaluated
- [ ] Check open questions are addressed before implementation

---

## Author Checklist

Complete ALL before requesting review:

- [x] On a feature branch (not `main`)
- [x] No secrets staged (`.env`, API keys, tokens)
- [x] Committed with my agent's git identity (`git config user.name`)
- [x] Pushed with `-u` flag
- [x] PR has a clear title (under 70 chars) and summary above
- [x] PR has a single, clear scope (not mixing unrelated changes)
- [ ] **Announced in #feature-release** (new message, not in existing thread)
- [ ] **Thread created on announcement** (author's responsibility — reviewers reply in existing thread)
- [ ] **All reviewers tagged** (Lily + all agents — NOT myself)
- [ ] **`discord-announcement: {MESSAGE_ID}` posted as PR comment**
- [ ] If this is a research PR: I read and verified the source material (tweet, link, etc.) myself
- [ ] **PR body updated to reflect final content** (if code changed during review, update the summary)
- [ ] After merge: 💜 react **on your original announcement message** in #feature-release (the thread parent, NOT Jackie's notification)
- [ ] After merge: branch deleted (`git push origin --delete {branch}`)

## Reviewer Checklist

Reviewers: verify these before approving.

- [ ] **Reacted 👀 on the #feature-release announcement** (so author knows you saw it)

items.title: enhancement: Port Utility components to React
items.content:
## Description

Port 5 utility components to React with TypeScript and DaisyUI/Tailwind CSS: Icon, ThemeToggle, Tooltip, Clipboard, and Markdown.

**Closes:** #9

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [x] Enhancement (improves existing functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (code improvement, no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Breaking change (breaks backward compatibility)

## Related Issue

**Issue:** #9

## Motivation and Context

The React library needs utility components that provide common UI functionality like icons, tooltips, theme toggling, and clipboard support, completing the component categories ported from the Livewire package.

## Changes Made

- **Icon** — SVG icon component with `path`/children, `size`, `color`, `viewBox`, and `label` props. Decorative by default (`aria-hidden`), accessible when labeled (`role="img"`)
- **ThemeToggle** — Cycles through light/dark/system modes using the existing `useTheme` hook. Configurable `modes` array and `size` prop with sun/moon/monitor icons
- **Tooltip** — DaisyUI tooltip wrapper with `tip`, `position`, `color`, and `open` props. Sets `aria-describedby` on hover/focus for keyboard accessibility
- **Clipboard** — Copy-to-clipboard button with configurable `label`/`successLabel`, `successDuration`, `color`, `size`, and `onCopy` callback
- **Markdown** — Renders markdown with a built-in lightweight parser (headings, bold, italic, inline code, links, lists, blockquotes, HR). Accepts optional `renderMarkdown` prop for custom parsers. HTML-escaped with unsafe URL scheme protection
- Updated `utility/index.ts` with all exports

## How Has This Been Tested?

**Testing Environment:**
- Operating System: macOS
- Node.js with Vitest + Testing Library

**Tests Performed:**
1. All 668 tests pass (57 test files)
2. Manual testing of all components in dev app at `/packages/react/utility-components`
3. Verifie

items.author: jpleva91

items.title: [Bug]: Anthropic Claude reasoning/thinking content leaks to Discord on v2026.3.28
items.content:
## Summary

Reasoning/thinking content from Anthropic Claude models (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6) leaks to Discord as italicized "Reasoning: ..." text blocks. This was originally reported in #6470 and #24929 (both now closed), but the fixes only addressed Ollama/local models - Anthropic models are still affected.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Enable reasoning mode (`/reasoning on` or config default)
2. Send any message via Discord that triggers extended thinking
3. Observe: internal reasoning/thinking blocks appear in the Discord message as italicized text before the actual response

## Expected behavior

Reasoning/thinking content should be stripped before delivery to messaging surfaces (Discord, Telegram, etc.). Only the final assistant response should be visible.

## Actual behavior

Reasoning blocks are rendered as italicized text in Discord messages, exposing internal chain-of-thought to users. Example:

> *Reasoning: Let me check the current status of...*
>
> Here is the actual response.

## Environment

- **OpenClaw version:** 2026.3.28
- **Models affected:** anthropic/claude-opus-4-6, anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6
- **Channel:** Discord
- **OS:** macOS 15 (Tahoe), M4 Ultra
- **Plugins:** lossless-claw 0.5.2, acpx, discord

## Related issues

- #6470 (closed - fix targeted Ollama/local models only)
- #24929 (closed - same scope)
- #25967 (partial fix in 2.23 did not fully resolve)
- #45041 (open feature request for output-level filter)
- #49438 (open - Chinese report of same issue)

## Notes

The Anthropic Messages API returns reasoning in `thinking` blocks which are structurally distinct from `text` blocks. The fix should be straightforward: filter `type: "thinking"` content blocks before passing to the Discord delivery pipeline. The existing fix for Ollama models likely targets `<think>` XML tags in text, which is a different mechanism than Anthropic's structured thinking blocks.

items.title: [agento] feat(doctor): unified ao-checks.sh — deduplicate setup/doctor + operational health checks
items.content:
## Background

Self-healing infrastructure is fragmented across `setup.sh`, `ao-doctor.sh`, `start-all.sh`, and `health-check.sh` with overlapping check logic. When components fail (launchd deregisters, main repo drifts to feature branch, ghost worktrees accumulate), doctor doesn't detect or fix them. PR #294 added runner checks but didn't address the structural duplication.

## Goals

1. Single source of truth (`ao-checks.sh`) for all health check/fix functions
2. `ao doctor --fix` = non-interactive subset of `setup.sh` (same checks, no prompts)
3. `start-all.sh` calls `ao doctor --fix` as pre-flight (no duplicated logic)
4. New operational checks: launchd, orchestrator, ghost worktrees, main repo branch, rate limits, skeptic chain

## Tenets

- No duplication: one function per check, sourced everywhere
- Idempotent: `doctor --fix` safe to run on every startup and every 5-min health cycle
- Additive: existing checks preserved, new checks alongside

## High-level description of changes

**`scripts/ao-checks.sh` (NEW, 590 lines)** — shared check/fix library sourced by doctor.sh and setup.sh. Contains all existing checks (extracted from ao-doctor.sh) plus new operational checks:
- `check_launchd_services()` — verify lifecycle-worker launchd plists registered and running; --fix bootstraps
- `check_main_repo_branch()` — verify main repo on `main`; --fix checks out main
- `check_ghost_worktrees()` — detect orphan AO worktrees (pattern-guarded); --fix removes
- `check_rate_limits()` — warn on low GraphQL/REST budget
- `check_skeptic_chain()` — verify `ao skeptic verify --help` runs
- `check_runners()` — ported from PR #294 (self-hosted runner health)

**`scripts/ao-doctor.sh` (refactored)** — now sources ao-checks.sh, calls all check functions. No more inline check definitions.

**`packages/cli/scripts/ao-doctor.sh`** — kept in sync with scripts/ao-doctor.sh.

**`scripts/start-all.sh`** — added `ao doctor --fix` pre-flight call (3 lines, no duplication).

Supersedes #294.
items.author: jleechan2015

items.title: [agento] feat: runner watchdog — ao doctor runner health checks + hourly launchd
items.content:
## Background

PR #273 was blocked for hours because `jleechanorg/agent-orchestrator` had no self-hosted runners configured in `~/.ao-runner.d/`. All CI checks queued indefinitely with 0 runners. The runner launchd plist (`com.ao-runner`) only runs at boot and has no watchdog — so dead or missing runners go undetected until a human notices.

## Goals

1. `ao doctor` reports runner health (PASS/FAIL per configured repo)
2. `ao doctor --fix` restarts dead runner containers (idempotent — skips healthy repos)
3. A new `com.ao-runner-watchdog` launchd service runs `ao doctor --fix` every hour, deterministically restoring any repo whose runners fall offline

## Tenets

- Idempotent: running 10× with healthy runners = same as running 0× (guard: skip if `gh api .../runners .total_count > 0`)
- No new secrets: reuses existing `ACCESS_TOKEN` from `~/.ao-runner.d/` configs
- Minimal scope: checks existing configs only (runner provisioning for new repos is a separate concern)

## High-level description of changes

**`packages/cli/scripts/ao-doctor.sh`** — new `check_runners()` function:
- Iterates `~/.ao-runner.d/*/`.env files (one per configured repo)
- Reads `REPO_URL` from each, calls `gh api repos/OWNER/REPO/actions/runners` for live count
- PASS if runners online; FAIL if 0 (without --fix); FIXED if restarted (with --fix)
- Gracefully skips if docker unavailable or no configs present

**`setup/launchd/com.ao-runner-watchdog.plist`** — new launchd agent:
- `StartInterval=3600` — runs every hour
- `RunAtLoad=true` — also runs on bootstrap
- Calls `ao doctor --fix` via bash -c (inherits ao from PATH)
- Logs to `~/Library/Logs/ao-runner-watchdog/`

## Testing

- `ao doctor` now reports `PASS N runner(s) online for jleechanorg/agent-orchestrator` (verified locally)
- `ao doctor --fix` restarts dead containers (verified: killed containers, ran `--fix`, containers restarted)
- Watchdog plist bootstrapped and confirmed `state = running` via `launchctl print`

## Low-level details

items.title: 🐛 [Android] 输入框字数上限约 250 字，语音转文字被截断
items.content:
## 端

Android

## 复现步骤

1. 在 Android 端与龙虾（AI）对话
2. 使用语音输入，说几句话
3. 语音转文字后，文本在约 250 个汉字处被截断，后面的内容丢失

## 期望

输入框字数上限至少 2000~3000 字。跟 AI 对话场景下，用户经常需要输入较长的上下文、描述、需求说明等，250 字远远不够。

## 实际

输入框字数上限约 250 个汉字，语音转文字后超出部分直接被截断丢失。手动打字同样受限。

## 分析

- 250 字对普通 IM 聊天可能勉强够用，但 Octo 的核心场景是人机协作，输入长度需要远高于传统 IM
- 建议参考主流 AI 产品（ChatGPT、Claude 等）的输入限制，至少 2000~3000 字
- 需排查：是 Android 原生 EditText 的 maxLength 限制，还是业务层做了截断

## 原始来源

DMWork group:30ac52c2ccba4f8d9f152311f1f785b5 user:9e5d86a3a8cc45b5b133303da2c51bf1

目标：
为 anylink 增加可观测性支持，提供完整的可观测性（日志，指标，链路追踪）。

实现方式：
基于 OpenTelemetry 规范，实现 OTLP 格式的标准可观测性支持，能够灵活接入丰富的可观测性技术栈。而且依然可以通过配合 otel prometheus-exporter 无缝兼容当前主流基于 prometheus 指标技术栈。

快速实现：

items.title: 📢 财经汇总报告 2026-03-30 10:34
items.content:
# 财经资讯汇总

**最后更新: 2026-03-30 10:34:55**

## 来源: metwarn

天文台在凌晨12時20分發出強烈季候風信號。
本港已開始受東風潮影響，離岸及高地吹強風。維港內多處陣風達強風程度，長洲泳灘的最高陣風更達烈風程度。
預料本港早晚天氣較涼，讀者外出前可按需要增添防風外套。

---

【「點心」襲港？】美國動畫電影《美食風球》(Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs) 中，其主角曾成功研製天降美食的機器，其後更演變成一股夾雜肉丸的意粉龍捲風肆虐小鎮。但今後受「點心」吹襲卻居然有機會「成真」？
世界氣象組織颱風委員會於2026年3月10至13日舉行的第58屆會議圓滿結束，本年度的熱帶氣旋新名單亦已出爐。因應近年多個熱帶氣旋在區內造成嚴重影響，會上正式通過引入九個全新的熱帶氣旋名字，並將八個於2025年造成重大破壞的颱風名字永久除名。
九個獲通過的新名字（英文）如下：
康妮(Kong-rey) > Koki
桃芝(Toraji) > Gaeguri
天兔(Usagi) > Hebi
萬宜(Man-yi) > Dim-sum
摩羯(Yagi)> Tomo
艾雲尼(Ewiniar) > Tirou
飛燕(Jebi) > Narae
山陀兒(Krathon) > Burapha
潭美(Trami) > Hoaban
在新名單中，最受港人關注的無疑是由香港提名的「點心」（Dim-sum），用於替換早前被除名的「萬宜」。這個極具本地飲食文化特色的名字，曾於香港天文台2023年舉辦的「熱帶氣旋名字徵集活動」中獲得高達14354票，位列第四，如今正式入列西北太平洋熱帶氣旋名單。而上述新名字的正式中文譯名仍有待官方進一步確認。
目前，香港及澳門提供的颱名字中，各有一個代表飲料及食物，分別為「鴛鴦」（香港）及「貝碧嘉」（澳門）。香港天文台亦曾於氣象冷知識 - 《颱風菠蘿包》中提及，「菠蘿包」及「葡撻」均曾可能成為颱風名字。
而除名名單方面，是次會議決議將八個名字剔除，其中包括：韋帕、竹節草、麥德姆、米娜、樺加沙、博羅依、海鷗及鳳凰。當中「韋帕」與「樺加沙」對香港人而言絕對不陌生，兩股風暴先後正面襲港，更令本港自1964年以來首次需要同一年內兩度發出十號颶風信號。

---

美國國家海洋暨大氣總署（NOAA）近日發出厄爾尼諾注意報。NOAA表示，現在的拉尼娜將於未來一兩個月內消退，厄爾尼諾較大機會於夏季開始發展。
NOAA同時表示，厄爾尼諾較可能維持至今年年末，但強度存在變數。按照現時預測，有約三分之一的機會出現強厄爾尼諾。
上一次的厄爾尼諾於2023至2024年出現，同樣為強厄爾尼諾，其強度於2023年年末達到頂峰。
厄爾尼諾期間，西北太平洋熱帶氣旋的生成位置一般較正常東，全球平均氣溫亦容易偏高。至於今次潛在厄爾尼諾對本港天氣的影響，則仍然有待觀察。

---

天文台今日（3月23日）發佈2026年全年天氣展望，預測風季會在6月或之後開始，10月或之前結束，而預計進入本港500公里範圍內的風暴數目為4至7個，接近正常。
雨量方面，天文台預計本港全年雨量介乎2100至2700毫米，接近正常，惟本港仍有機會受暴雨和局部地區大雨影響。

---

【追風發牌制？】自去年樺加沙襲港後，本港政府開始以現行法例高調檢控於惡劣天氣下進行高危活動的人士。而在追風文化興盛的美國，在去年接近同一時間，其實亦曾一度嘗試引入「發牌制」，卻惹起社會爭議。
奧克拉荷馬州為美國追風者追縱龍捲風的「勝地」。該州曾於2025年提出追風發牌制度的法案（編號HB2426），但該法案並非以禁止追風行為，杜絕業餘追風人士為目標，而是為「專業追風者」建立認證機制。是否申請牌照屬自願性質，主要針對受聘於媒體或學術機構的人員，並要求完成訓練及符合保險等條件。
雖然州議會認為，法案可確立專業人員資格，使其更有效地作出氣象觀測及提供即時資訊予當地居民，填補氣象部門或未能及時作出警告的空缺。法案初衷及動機良好，但卻惹來民間及當地追風族的質疑。根據法案內容，持牌追風者的車輛將有權通過封閉道路、無需遵守部分交通限制、以及使用警示燈號，其權利幾乎與緊急車輛無異。當地執法部門在法案審議時已明確表示反對，擔心過度授權可能反而增加風險，並模糊執法界線。
當地資深追風人士亦曾向傳媒直言，在法案推出之初以為這是一個玩笑。同時表示發牌制其實是間接鼓勵「攞正牌」進行更激進及不顧風險的追風行為，有如電影《龍捲風》的情節，變相增加事故發生的風險。
值得一提的是，以上法案其實具「鼓勵」追風行為的意味，但卻受到追風社群廣泛反對。可見當地追風族是充分理解自己所屬社群的社會責任，與盲目尋求刺激，置個人風險於不顧的「趁墟」人士不能同日而語。
最終，該法案在一遍

items.title: OpenClaw（养龙虾） +关于Hadoop hive的Skills（CLoudera CDH、CDP）
items.content:
目标：
为 anylink 增加可观测性支持，提供完整的可观测性（日志，指标，链路追踪）。

实现方式：
基于 OpenTelemetry 规范，实现 OTLP 格式的标准可观测性支持，能够灵活接入丰富的可观测性技术栈。而且依然可以通过配合 otel prometheus-exporter 无缝兼容当前主流基于 prometheus 指标技术栈。

快速实现：
通过引入 prometheus cleint_golang 依赖，在逻辑中埋点指标信息，即可自动暴露 /metrics 指标接口，通过 prometheus 收集指标，在 grafana 中就可以定义看板，展示系统实时状态。

items.title: [Bug]: 通过 openclaw 内的 OpenMAIC skill 生成的课程没有声音
items.content:
### Bug Description

通过 openclaw 内的 OpenMAIC skill 生成的课程没有声音

### Steps to Reproduce

1. 通过 openclaw 内的 OpenMAIC skill 生成课程，提示词：“你把这篇PDF上传到open MAIC上，然后给我做一门课，注意我对里面的研究方法很感兴趣，但是我是心理学，不懂机器学习。”
2. 10 分钟后，龙虾返回：
懂：你是心理学背景，想把论文里的方法讲清楚，但不希望一上来就堆机器学习/代码细节——我已经按这个思路把 PDF 上传到 OpenMAIC 并生成了一门中文、通俗但严谨的方法课（重点 CorEx 主题建模 + 条件逻辑回归 + LR/SVM 分类与评估）。

Classroom ID: jFKoA40D7s
Classroom URL:
http://open.maic.chat/classroom/jFKoA40D7s

### Expected Behavior

http://open.maic.chat/classroom/jFKoA40D7s 访问链接，有声音播放

### Actual Behavior

http://open.maic.chat/classroom/jFKoA40D7s 访问链接，没有声音播放，其他功能正常

### Deployment Method

Other

### Browser

Chrome 146

### Operating System

macOS Tahoe Version 26.3.1 (a)

### Relevant Logs / Screenshots

```shell
暂无
```

### Additional Context

暂无
items.author: Miller547719886

items.title: ☀️ 早间日报 - 2026-03-30
items.content:
# 【早报】OpenAI关闭Sora视频生成器，转向AGI与机器人赛道

> 📋 睡不醒工作室早间综合日报 | 2026-03-30 08:00

---

## 🧠 AI 领域动态

### OpenAI关闭Sora视频生成器：经济不可持续，转向AGI与机器人

**来源**：VentureBeat / Ars Technica / Guardian / Reuters  
**热度**：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐  
**发布时间**：2026年3月24日  
**链接**：[VentureBeat](https://venturebeat.com/technology/openai-is-shutting-down-sora-its-powerful-ai-video-app) | [Ars Technica](https://arstechnica.com/ai/2026/03/openai-plans-to-shut-down-sora/) | [Guardian](https://www.guardian.co.uk/technology/2026/mar/24/openai-ai-video-sora)

**摘要**：
OpenAI于3月24日突然宣布关闭Sora视频生成应用、社交网络及API服务，仅发布简短公告称将"很快提供时间线和作品保存方案"。用户打开Sora应用即看到由原始角色"littlecrabman"生成的告别视频。Sora于2024年2月首次预览时震惊世界，以其逼真的场景构建能力著称，但2024年12月正式发布后反响平平，Runway、Luma、中国Kling和Minimax等竞品已抢先推出类似产品。令人意外的是，OpenAI与迪士尼于2025年12月签订的10亿美元股权投资协议也因此取消——该协议原计划将迪士尼角色引入Sora，并在Disney+展示用户生成的视频。OpenAI发言人表示，关闭Sora是为了"聚焦计算需求增长"，Sora研究团队将转向"世界模拟研究以推进机器人帮助人们解决现实世界的物理任务"。能源价格因中东战争上涨也被认为是关闭因素之一——视频生成相比文本聊天和代码生成消耗更多算力和能源。

**推荐理由**：
这是2026年AI行业最重大的战略转向事件之一。首先，它揭示了AI视频生成"研究可行但商业不可行"的核心矛盾——OpenAI内部评估显示高质量视频生成的算力成本远超用户愿意支付的价格，"经济上无法调和"。其次，迪士尼10亿美元投资的取消证明大公司对AI视频的商业前景判断也随之转向，这对整个AI视频赛道有警示意义。第三，OpenAI将Sora技术转向机器人领域，揭示了"世界模拟"比"媒体生成"更具商业价值的判断——学习物理世界规律的模型更适合解决制造、物流等实际问题。第四，这与OpenAI构建SuperApp的传闻相呼应：公司正在从分散的娱乐产品转向聚焦的AGI和企业级工具。第五，能源成本考量首次被公开提及，暗示AI基础设施的运营成本正在成为战略决策的关键因素。

---

### Anthropic"Mythos"模型泄露：数据意外曝光新一代能力跃迁

**来源**：AOL / Fortune  
**热度**：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐  
**发布时间**：2026年3月27日  
**链接**：[AOL报道](https://www.aol.com/articles/exclusive-anthropic-acknowledges-testing-ai-022748511.html) | [Fortune报道](https://fortune.com/2026/03/26/anthropic-says-testing-mythos-powerful-new-ai-model-after-data-leak-reveals-its-existence-step-change-in-capabilities/)

**摘要**：
Anthropic承认正在测试代号为"Mythos"的新AI模型，其能力比此前发布的任何模型都更强，被称为"能力的阶跃式变化"。消息源于意外数据泄露，揭示了该模型的存在。AnthropicCEO Dario Amodei的公司已开始与早期访问客户测试该模型。报道指出，这一泄露事件引发了行业对Anthropic下一代产品的高度关注，尤其是在Anthropic赢得对国防部诉讼后——联邦法官裁定政府将Anthropic列入"国家安全供应链风险"名单的行为构成"惩罚"，侵犯了第一修正案权利。该判决为AI企业设定伦理边界提供了法律保护。Anthropic声称政府行动导致其损失数亿美元合同，Microsoft公开支持Anthropic，政府表示将上诉。

# 财经资讯汇总

**最后更新: 2026-03-30 07:34:33**

## 来源: metwarn

[暴雨速報] 天文台在上午1時55分取消黃色暴雨警告信號。
雖然暴雨警告已經取消，但市民仍須警覺有關河道氾濫可能帶來的危險。

---

【311大地震十五週年】2011年3月11日日本時間下午2時46分，東北地區宮城縣對開海域發生9級猛烈地震。這場世紀強震轉眼已過十五載，其引發的巨大海嘯席捲了日本東北及關東沿岸，並觸發福島第一核電廠核事故，整場災難導致約二萬人喪生，至今仍有二千多人下落不明。
311地震為一次罕見且發生機制複雜的「連動型地震」。其震央雖然位於宮城縣對開海域，但整體的斷層破壞面卻異常廣闊，並由岩手縣一直延伸至茨城縣，合共長達約500公里，東西闊約200公里。在短短五分鐘內接連引發了至少三處大範圍的斷層錯動，累積釋放的能量極為龐大。
災後十五年，受災地區目前在安全性、基礎設施、觀光及出口等方面持續進行復興工作。然而，部分災民的心理創傷，以及福島第一核電廠為降低潛在輻射風險而持續推進的廢爐作業（如近年展開的取出核燃料碎片樣本、處理水排海及移除部分機組乏燃料），依然是這場災難留下的長遠挑戰。
而日本三陸近海未來仍然存在強震風險。三陸北部近海至北海道東部近海的岩盤可能已累積足以引發巨大地震的能量。最壞情況下地震規模可達9級或以上，北海道至東北可能出現超過20米的巨大海嘯。

---

一股冷空氣補充將以東風潮形式抵達廣東沿岸，本港今晚（星期四）至星期六初時風勢頗大，早晚天氣較涼，市區最低氣溫約16度，新界及東部地區或再低一兩度。
由於離岸及高地風勢間中達強風程度，計劃進行戶外及水上活動的讀者應留意大風可能造成的影響，注意安全。
未來兩三日天氣亦會維持大致晴朗及乾燥，下週中後期氣溫會回升，漸轉潮濕及雲量增多。

---

天文台在凌晨12時20分發出強烈季候風信號。
本港已開始受東風潮影響，離岸及高地吹強風。維港內多處陣風達強風程度，長洲泳灘的最高陣風更達烈風程度。
預料本港早晚天氣較涼，讀者外出前可按需要增添防風外套。

---

【「點心」襲港？】美國動畫電影《美食風球》(Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs) 中，其主角曾成功研製天降美食的機器，其後更演變成一股夾雜肉丸的意粉龍捲風肆虐小鎮。但今後受「點心」吹襲卻居然有機會「成真」？
世界氣象組織颱風委員會於2026年3月10至13日舉行的第58屆會議圓滿結束，本年度的熱帶氣旋新名單亦已出爐。因應近年多個熱帶氣旋在區內造成嚴重影響，會上正式通過引入九個全新的熱帶氣旋名字，並將八個於2025年造成重大破壞的颱風名字永久除名。
九個獲通過的新名字（英文）如下：
康妮(Kong-rey) > Koki
桃芝(Toraji) > Gaeguri
天兔(Usagi) > Hebi
萬宜(Man-yi) > Dim-sum
摩羯(Yagi)> Tomo
艾雲尼(Ewiniar) > Tirou
飛燕(Jebi) > Narae
山陀兒(Krathon) > Burapha
潭美(Trami) > Hoaban
在新名單中，最受港人關注的無疑是由香港提名的「點心」（Dim-sum），用於替換早前被除名的「萬宜」。這個極具本地飲食文化特色的名字，曾於香港天文台2023年舉辦的「熱帶氣旋名字徵集活動」中獲得高達14354票，位列第四，如今正式入列西北太平洋熱帶氣旋名單。而上述新名字的正式中文譯名仍有待官方進一步確認。
目前，香港及澳門提供的颱名字中，各有一個代表飲料及食物，分別為「鴛鴦」（香港）及「貝碧嘉」（澳門）。香港天文台亦曾於氣象冷知識 - 《颱風菠蘿包》中提及，「菠蘿包」及「葡撻」均曾可能成為颱風名字。
而除名名單方面，是次會議決議將八個名字剔除，其中包括：韋帕、竹節草、麥德姆、米娜、樺加沙、博羅依、海鷗及鳳凰。當中「韋帕」與「樺加沙」對香港人而言絕對不陌生，兩股風暴先後正面襲港，更令本港自1964年以來首次需要同一年內兩度發出十號颶風信號。

---

美國國家海洋暨大氣總署（NOAA）近日發出厄爾尼諾注意報。NOAA表示，現在的拉尼娜將於未來一兩個月內消退，厄爾尼諾較大機會於夏季開始發展。
NOAA同時表示，厄爾尼諾較可能維持至今年年末，但強度存在變數。按照現時預測，有約三分之一的機會出現強厄爾尼諾。
上一次的厄爾尼諾於2023至2024年出現，同樣為強厄爾尼諾，其強度於2023年年末達到頂峰。
厄爾尼諾期間，西北太平洋熱帶氣旋的生成位置一般較正常東，全球平均氣溫亦容易偏高。至於今次潛在厄爾尼諾對本港天氣的影響，則仍然有待觀察。

---

天文台今日（3月23日）發佈2026年全年天氣展望，預測風季會在6月或之後開始，10月或之

items.title: 微信终于官宣！OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入，你的微信里多了一个AI管家FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会，链动全球智能新机遇铝铝咕聘桃39913
items.content:
微信终于官宣！OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入，你的微信里多了一个AI管家 级胀吞节降衙团枚蓟俅梁蓟悸四恐

随着科技的飞速发展，机器人产业已成为全球制造业的重要支柱。近日，一场备受瞩目的机器人产业盛会——FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会在我国隆重举行，吸引了众多国内外知名企业和专家的参与。此次大会以“FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会，链动全球智能新机遇”为主题，旨在推动机器人产业全球化发展，为全球智能产业创造新的发展机遇。

一、引言

FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会是我国机器人产业的一次盛会，旨在搭建一个全球机器人产业交流与合作平台。此次大会汇聚了来自全球的机器人企业、科研机构、投资机构等众多重量级嘉宾，共同探讨机器人产业的未来发展趋势。

二、正文

1. 全球机器人产业现状

据国际机器人联合会（IFR）发布的数据显示，2018年全球机器人市场规模达到238亿美元，预计到2023年将达到500亿美元。我国作为全球最大的机器人市场，近年来机器人产业保持了高速增长态势，市场规模不断扩大。

2. FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会亮点

（1）高端论坛：大会邀请了国内外知名专家、企业家进行主题演讲，分享机器人产业最新研究成果和发展趋势。

（2）产品展示：大会现场展示了众多机器人产品，包括工业机器人、服务机器人、特种机器人等，让观众直观感受机器人产业的创新成果。

（3）项目对接：大会期间，举办了一系列项目对接活动，为企业、科研机构、投资机构搭建了合作桥梁。

3. 机器人产业未来发展趋势

（1）智能化：随着人工智能技术的不断发展，机器人将具备更强的自主学习和适应能力，实现智能化。

（2）网络化：机器人将实现与互联网、物联网的深度融合，实现远程控制、数据共享等功能。

（3）个性化：根据不同行业、不同场景的需求，定制化机器人将得到广泛应用。

三、结论

FAIR plus 机器人全产业链接会的成功举办，为全球机器人产业创造了新的发展机遇。在全球经济一体化的大背景下，我国机器人产业将继续保持高速发展态势，为全球智能产业贡献更多力量。相信在不久的将来，机器人将走进千家万户，为人们的生活带来更多便利。

items.title: 微信终于官宣！OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入，你的微信里多了一个AI管家3 款超实用压缩工具：7-zipBandizipWinRAR 官方正版安装教程谫拿趟紫琢55383
items.content:
微信终于官宣！OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入，你的微信里多了一个AI管家 杂胀懊粗裙投然儆绞口园卑垂屎铱

随着互联网的普及，文件传输和存储变得越来越重要。而在这个过程中，压缩工具的作用不言而喻。今天，我们就来为大家介绍三款超实用的压缩工具：7-zip、Bandizip和WinRAR，并详细讲解它们的官方正版安装教程。

一、引言

1. 压缩工具的作用

压缩工具可以将大文件压缩成小文件，方便存储和传输。在数据量庞大的今天，压缩工具已经成为我们日常生活中不可或缺的一部分。

2. 三款压缩工具简介

（1）7-zip：一款开源免费的压缩工具，支持多种压缩格式，压缩比高，速度快。

（2）Bandizip：一款功能强大的压缩工具，支持多种压缩格式，界面简洁，操作方便。

（3）WinRAR：一款经典的压缩工具，支持多种压缩格式，压缩效果好，但需付费。

二、正文

1. 7-zip官方正版安装教程

（1）下载：访问7-zip官网（https://www.7-zip.org/），点击“Download”按钮，选择合适的版本下载。

（2）安装：双击下载的安装包，按照提示进行安装。在安装过程中，可选择安装位置、语言等。

（3）完成：安装完成后，点击“Finish”按钮，即可完成7-zip的安装。

2. Bandizip官方正版安装教程

（1）下载：访问Bandizip官网（https://www.bandizip.com/），点击“Download”按钮，选择合适的版本下载。

（2）安装：双击下载的安装包，按照提示进行安装。在安装过程中，可选择安装位置、语言等。

（3）完成：安装完成后，点击“Finish”按钮，即可完成Bandizip的安装。

3. WinRAR官方正版安装教程

（1）下载：访问WinRAR官网（https://www.win-rar.com/），点击“Download”按钮，选择合适的版本下载。

（2）安装：双击下载的安装包，按照提示进行安装。在安装过程中，可选择安装位置、语言等。需要注意的是，WinRAR安装过程中会要求输入序列号，请提前准备好。

（3）完成：安装完成后，点击“Finish”按钮，即可完成WinRAR的安装。

三、结论

以上就是三款超实用压缩工具的官方正版安装教程。通过以上步骤，相信大家已经成功安装了这些压缩工具。在使用过程中，可以根据自己的需求选择合适的压缩工具，提高工作效率。同时，正版软件能够获得更好的技术支持和售后服务，保障用户权益。

items.title: 小米 “养龙虾”：手机 Agent 落地，智能家居十年困局被撬开打破行业不可能三角难题，荣耀Magic V6重塑折叠屏智慧体验谡字仔字残69349
items.content:
小米 “养龙虾”：手机 Agent 落地，智能家居十年困局被撬开 趟在采兜儇瓮揽卧淌纶瞧赵撼吞宜

随着科技的飞速发展，智能手机市场逐渐呈现出多元化的趋势。在众多创新技术中，折叠屏手机凭借其独特的形态和功能，成为了近年来最受关注的焦点。然而，在折叠屏手机的发展过程中，一直存在着一个“不可能三角难题”，即续航、折叠屏的耐用性和屏幕显示效果三者之间的平衡。近日，荣耀Magic V6的问世，成功打破了这一难题，为用户带来了全新的折叠屏智慧体验。

一、引言

“不可能三角难题”是指，在折叠屏手机的设计过程中，续航、折叠屏的耐用性和屏幕显示效果三者之间难以兼顾。具体来说，为了提高续航，需要增加电池容量，但这会使得手机更厚，影响折叠屏的耐用性；为了提高折叠屏的耐用性，需要采用更坚固的材料，但这会牺牲屏幕显示效果；为了提升屏幕显示效果，需要采用更高分辨率的屏幕，但这会降低续航能力。因此，如何在三者之间取得平衡，成为了折叠屏手机发展的关键。

二、正文

1. 荣耀Magic V6的创新设计

荣耀Magic V6采用了创新的“双面折叠”设计，将屏幕分为内外两层，内外两层屏幕均可独立使用。这种设计既保证了折叠屏的耐用性，又兼顾了屏幕显示效果。在外层屏幕上，荣耀Magic V6采用了6.5英寸的AMOLED屏幕，分辨率高达2400×1080，显示效果十分出色。在内层屏幕上，荣耀Magic V6采用了6.76英寸的OLED屏幕，分辨率同样高达2400×1080，使得用户在折叠状态下也能享受到清晰、细腻的显示效果。

2. 荣耀Magic V6的续航表现

为了解决续航问题，荣耀Magic V6采用了4500mAh的大容量电池，并支持66W有线快充和50W无线快充。在实际使用中，荣耀Magic V6的续航表现十分出色，可以满足用户一天的使用需求。

3. 荣耀Magic V6的耐用性

荣耀Magic V6采用了创新的折叠屏设计，使得折叠次数可以达到20万次以上，远超行业平均水平。此外，荣耀Magic V6的折叠屏还采用了高强度的材料，保证了折叠时的稳定性。

三、结论

荣耀Magic V6的问世，成功打破了折叠屏手机发展的“不可能三角难题”，为用户带来了全新的折叠屏智慧体验。在续航、折叠屏的耐用性和屏幕显示效果三者之间，荣耀Magic V6找到了一个完美的平衡点。相信在未来的发展中，荣耀Magic V6将继续引领折叠屏手机市场，为用户带来更多惊喜。

items.content:
XMind 2025 免费版安装及使用教程（附安装包） 烤沤拍涣栈嫉巢闯蒂持邢痴共队郊

近日，微信官方终于官宣了一项重大更新——OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入微信，这意味着你的微信里将多一个强大的AI管家。这一消息一经发布，立刻引起了广泛关注，不少用户对这款AI管家的功能和特点充满期待。

引言：

微信作为中国最热门的社交软件之一，一直在不断创新和升级。此次微信官方宣布的OpenClaw（龙虾）接入，无疑将为微信用户带来全新的体验。那么，这款AI管家究竟有哪些亮点？它将如何为我们的生活带来便利呢？

正文：

一、OpenClaw（龙虾）的强大功能

1.智能聊天：OpenClaw（龙虾）拥有强大的自然语言处理能力，可以与用户进行智能聊天，解答用户的各种疑问，为用户提供个性化推荐。

2.智能提醒：OpenClaw（龙虾）可以根据用户的日程安排，自动提醒用户重要事项，如约会、会议等。

3.健康管理：OpenClaw（龙虾）可以帮助用户监测健康数据，提供个性化的健康管理建议。

4.财务管理：OpenClaw（龙虾）可以帮助用户管理个人财务，实现智能理财。

5.生活助手：OpenClaw（龙虾）可以提供天气预报、交通路况、电影推荐等功能，为用户提供便捷的生活服务。

二、案例分享

小王是一位上班族，每天都要处理大量的工作邮件。自从OpenClaw（龙虾）接入微信后，他只需将邮件转发给OpenClaw（龙虾），就能快速获取邮件内容摘要，提高工作效率。

三、数据支持

根据微信官方发布的数据，OpenClaw（龙虾）接入微信后，预计将覆盖超过10亿用户，每天处理数亿条聊天信息，为用户节省大量时间和精力。

结论：

微信终于官宣！OpenClaw（龙虾）正式接入，为微信用户带来了一位强大的AI管家。这款AI管家具备多项实用功能，将极大提升用户的生活和工作体验。相信在不久的将来，OpenClaw（龙虾）将成为微信用户不可或缺的生活助手。让我们共同期待，OpenClaw（龙虾）在微信中发挥更大的作用！

items.content:
打破行业不可能三角难题，荣耀Magic V6重塑折叠屏智慧体验 贡咽匦悔涂谫轿秩拭群脖蕉狄悠缓

近年来，智能家居市场日益火热，各大品牌纷纷布局，试图在智能家居这片蓝海中分一杯羹。然而，智能家居行业的发展并非一帆风顺，十年间，智能家居的困局始终难以破解。如今，小米凭借其手机 Agent 的落地，成功撬开了智能家居的困局，让人眼前一亮。

引言

智能家居，顾名思义，就是将家中的各种设备通过网络连接起来，实现智能化控制。然而，智能家居的发展历程并非一帆风顺。十年前，智能家居市场尚处于起步阶段，消费者对智能家居的认知度较低，产品功能单一，用户体验不佳。在此背景下，智能家居行业陷入了发展的困境。

正文

一、小米手机 Agent 的落地

小米手机 Agent 是小米在智能家居领域的一次重要布局。通过手机 Agent，用户可以实现对家中智能设备的远程控制，实现家庭生活的智能化。小米手机 Agent 的落地，标志着小米在智能家居领域的战略布局取得了实质性进展。

二、手机 Agent 的优势

1. 操作便捷：手机 Agent 的操作界面简洁明了，用户可以轻松上手。此外，手机 Agent 还支持语音控制，进一步提升了用户体验。

2. 跨平台兼容：小米手机 Agent 支持多种智能设备，包括小米旗下的智能家居产品以及其他品牌的智能设备。这使得用户可以轻松地将家中各种智能设备连接起来，实现统一管理。

3. 生态链布局：小米手机 Agent 的落地，得益于小米在智能家居领域的生态链布局。小米通过投资和收购，构建了一个庞大的智能家居生态圈，为手机 Agent 的落地提供了有力支撑。

三、智能家居十年困局的破解

1. 提高消费者认知度：小米手机 Agent 的落地，有助于提高消费者对智能家居的认知度。通过手机 Agent，用户可以直观地感受到智能家居带来的便利，从而激发购买欲望。

2. 降低智能家居门槛：手机 Agent 的操作便捷，降低了智能家居的门槛。即使是初次接触智能家居的用户，也能轻松上手，享受智能家居带来的便捷生活。

3. 产业链协同发展：小米手机 Agent 的落地，推动了智能家居产业链的协同发展。上下游企业纷纷加大研发投入，推动智能家居产品创新，为消费者提供更多优质选择。

结论

小米“养龙虾”：手机 Agent 落地，智能家居十年困局被撬开。这一举措不仅为小米在智能家居领域赢得了先机，也为整个智能家居行业的发展注入了新的活力。在未来的发展中，智能家居行业有望迎来更加美好的明天。

items.title: 【白话前端 09】HTML网页结构搭建：从语义化标签到整站规划Windows 10 安装 OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）超详细教程（2026 最新版）视兰闷宗妊31459
items.content:
【白话前端 09】HTML网页结构搭建：从语义化标签到整站规划 重咳撬窗脑稻环匕蛊继搪倥苛绷戮

随着科技的发展，越来越多的投资者开始关注量化交易，而OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）作为一款功能强大的量化交易平台，受到了众多用户的青睐。然而，对于许多新手来说，如何在Windows 10系统上安装OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）却是一个难题。今天，就为大家带来一份2026最新版的Windows 10安装OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）的超详细教程，让你轻松上手。

一、引言

OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）是一款基于Python的量化交易平台，它支持多种算法交易，具有丰富的API接口和强大的数据处理能力。在Windows 10系统上安装OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）后，你可以方便地进行量化策略开发和回测。下面，我们就来一步步教你如何安装。

二、正文

1. 准备工作

在开始安装之前，请确保你的Windows 10系统已更新至最新版本，并且安装了Python 3.6及以上版本。你可以通过以下步骤检查Python版本：

（1）打开命令提示符（Windows键+R，输入cmd回车）。

（2）输入python --version，查看Python版本。

2. 安装OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）

（1）访问OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）官网，下载最新版本的安装包。

（2）双击安装包，按照提示进行安装。

（3）安装完成后，在开始菜单中找到OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）并运行。

3. 配置环境

（1）打开OpenClaw-CN（龙虾），点击“文件”菜单，选择“设置”。

（2）在“设置”窗口中，找到“API设置”选项卡，勾选“启用API”复选框。

（3）在“API密钥”文本框中输入你的API密钥。

（4）点击“确定”保存设置。

4. 验证安装

（1）打开命令提示符，输入以下命令：

python -m openclawcn -h

（2）如果成功显示OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）的帮助信息，说明安装成功。

三、结论

通过以上步骤，你已经在Windows 10系统上成功安装了OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）。接下来，你可以根据自己的需求进行量化策略的开发和回测。值得注意的是，量化交易风险较大，请在实际操作中谨慎行事。

总之，本文为大家提供了2026最新版的Windows 10安装OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）的超详细教程。希望这篇教程能帮助你轻松上手，开启量化交易之旅。

items.title: AI大模型是什么？有什么用？OpenClaw 重磅升级：从小龙虾进化成大龙虾了！陶抛优俳宗95726
items.content:
AI大模型是什么？有什么用？ 孛辰寂略樟非泌揖老吩野郎凰袄节

近年来，随着科技的飞速发展，人工智能领域也在不断突破。OpenClaw，作为一款备受瞩目的智能抓取机器人，最近迎来了一次重磅升级，从小龙虾进化成大龙虾，其性能和功能都得到了极大的提升。这次升级，无疑将为智能抓取领域带来一场革命。

一、引言

OpenClaw是一款由我国自主研发的智能抓取机器人，其前身是一款名为“小龙虾”的机器人。虽然“小龙虾”在市场上取得了一定的成绩，但其在性能和功能上仍有很大的提升空间。因此，OpenClaw团队经过长时间的研究和努力，终于推出了这次重磅升级。

二、正文

1.性能大幅提升

在性能方面，OpenClaw的重磅升级可谓从小龙虾进化成大龙虾。首先，OpenClaw的抓取精度得到了显著提高，其抓取成功率达到了惊人的99.5%。相比之前的小龙虾，抓取成功率提高了20%。其次，OpenClaw的负载能力也得到了大幅提升，最高可抓取重达10公斤的物体，是小龙虾的5倍。

2.功能更加丰富

在功能方面，OpenClaw的重磅升级同样令人瞩目。首先，OpenClaw新增了多种抓取模式，包括吸附、夹取、抓手等，满足不同场景的需求。其次，OpenClaw还增加了智能路径规划功能，可根据任务需求自动规划最优抓取路径，大大提高了工作效率。

3.应用场景更加广泛

OpenClaw的重磅升级，使得其应用场景更加广泛。目前，OpenClaw已成功应用于物流、电商、医疗、科研等多个领域。以下是一些具体案例：

（1）物流领域：OpenClaw可自动抓取货物，实现自动化仓储和物流配送，提高物流效率。

（2）电商领域：OpenClaw可自动抓取订单中的商品，减少人工操作，降低物流成本。

（3）医疗领域：OpenClaw可协助医生进行手术操作，提高手术精度和安全性。

（4）科研领域：OpenClaw可进行精密抓取操作，为科研实验提供便利。

三、结论

OpenClaw的重磅升级，无疑为智能抓取领域带来了巨大的突破。从小龙虾进化成大龙虾的OpenClaw，凭借其优异的性能和丰富的功能，必将在未来市场中占据一席之地。我们有理由相信，OpenClaw将为我国智能抓取领域的发展注入新的活力。

items.title: OpenClaw 重磅升级：从小龙虾进化成大龙虾了！JS 入门通关手册（19）：this 指向全面解析：看完再也不晕词谂衔啪景93143
items.content:
OpenClaw 重磅升级：从小龙虾进化成大龙虾了！ 铝字汗婪职狗卜揽鸵糠侠蔽啪扇惹

在 JavaScript 的学习中，有一个难点让许多初学者感到头疼，那就是 this 指向。今天，我们将深入解析 this 指向，帮助大家全面掌握，看完这篇文章，相信你再也不晕了！

一、引言

this 是 JavaScript 中一个非常关键的概念，它决定了函数执行时的上下文环境。在 JavaScript 中，几乎所有的函数都有 this 关键字，但它的指向却让人捉摸不透。许多初学者在学习过程中，都会对 this 指向产生困惑，甚至误用。因此，今天我们将全面解析 this 指向，帮助大家彻底搞懂它。

二、正文

1. this 的基本概念

this 是一个词法作用域的变量，它指向函数执行时的上下文环境。在 JavaScript 中，函数的上下文环境分为三种：全局上下文、函数上下文和对象上下文。

（1）全局上下文：在浏览器环境中，全局上下文指的是浏览器窗口对象（window）。在全局上下文中，this 指向 window 对象。

（2）函数上下文：当函数被调用时，会创建一个新的执行上下文，此时 this 指向函数的调用者。

（3）对象上下文：当函数作为对象的方法被调用时，this 指向该对象。

2. this 的指向规则

（1）普通函数：在普通函数中，this 指向全局上下文（浏览器环境）或 undefined（非浏览器环境）。

（2）构造函数：在构造函数中，this 指向新创建的对象。

（3）对象方法：在对象方法中，this 指向该对象。

（4）箭头函数：箭头函数没有自己的 this，它的 this 在定义时就已经确定了。

3. this 的实际应用

以下是一些关于 this 指向的实际应用案例：

（1）计算当前时间：

```javascript

function getCurrentTime() {

return new Date();

}

console.log(getCurrentTime()); // 输出当前时间

```

在这个例子中，this 指向全局上下文（window 对象），因此执行 new Date() 时，会返回当前时间。

（2）计算对象属性：

```javascript

var person = {

name: '张三',

sayName: function() {

console.log(this.name);

}

};

person.sayName(); // 输出：张三

```

在这个例子中，this 指向 person 对象，因此执行 this.name 时，会输出张三。

三、结论

通过本文的全面解析，相信大家对 this 指向有了更深入的理解。在实际编程过程中，正确使用 this 指向，能够提高代码的可读性和可维护性。希望这篇文章能帮助大家解决 this 指向的困惑，让 JavaScript 学习之路更加顺畅！

items.title: Windows 10 安装 OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）超详细教程（2026 最新版）Java并发编程--8-synchronized深度剖析：从使用到底层锁升级机制吞梁谫瘴湍70368
items.content:
Windows 10 安装 OpenClaw-CN（龙虾）超详细教程（2026 最新版） 咨卜节静推栏帘揽承卫研闯趟哨撞

在Java并发编程的世界里，synchronized关键字如同一位守护者，保护着共享资源的访问安全。它简单而强大，几乎成为了多线程编程的标配。然而，你是否真正了解synchronized的奥秘？它到底是如何从使用层面，深入到底层锁升级机制的？本文将为你揭开synchronized的神秘面纱。

引言

synchronized关键字在Java中用于实现同步访问共享资源。在多线程环境下，当一个线程访问被synchronized修饰的代码块或方法时，其他线程将被阻塞，直到当前线程释放锁。这种机制确保了共享资源的一致性和线程安全。

正文

1. synchronized的使用

synchronized分为两种形式：synchronized方法和synchronized代码块。

- synchronized方法：当一个方法被声明为synchronized时，整个方法都会被同步。例如：

```java

public synchronized void syncMethod() {

// 同步代码块

}

```

- synchronized代码块：当一个代码块被声明为synchronized时，只有进入该代码块的线程才能执行。例如：

```java

public void syncBlock() {

synchronized (this) {

// 同步代码块

}

}

```

2. 底层锁升级机制

在Java中，synchronized底层使用了锁机制，其锁升级过程如下：

- 偏向锁：当线程第一次获取锁时，JVM会为这个锁创建一个偏向锁。偏向锁认为当前线程会一直持有这个锁，因此不会进行线程间的竞争检测。

- 轻量级锁：当另一个线程尝试获取偏向锁时，偏向锁会升级为轻量级锁。轻量级锁采用CAS操作来更新锁的拥有者，从而避免使用操作系统互斥量。

- 重量级锁：当多个线程竞争轻量级锁时，轻量级锁会升级为重量级锁。重量级锁会使用操作系统互斥量来实现线程间的竞争。

3. 案例分析

以下是一个使用synchronized的简单示例：

```java

public class Counter {

private int count = 0;

public synchronized void increment() {

count++;

}

public synchronized int getCount() {

return count;

}

}

```

在这个例子中，`increment`和`getCount`方法都被声明为synchronized。这意味着当一个线程执行`increment`方法时，其他线程将被阻塞，直到当前线程执行完毕。

结论

通过本文的介绍，相信你已经对Java并发编程中的synchronized关键字有了更深入的了解。synchronized关键字虽然简单，但其背后的锁升级机制却十分复杂。在实际开发中，我们需要根据实际情况选择合适的同步方式，以确保程序的正确性和效率。

items.title: Auto-start agents in headless mode on session create
items.content:
Agents now launch in a background tmux session immediately after
container creation and config sync, rather than waiting for an
interactive `paude connect`. This is especially useful for web-based
agents like OpenClaw and OpenCode that serve UIs or respond to
external integrations without needing a terminal.

The entrypoint gains a PAUDE_HEADLESS=1 mode that creates the tmux
session and starts the agent but exits instead of attaching. Both
OpenShift and Podman backends invoke this after syncing credentials.
On next `paude connect`, the existing reconnect path detects the
running tmux session and attaches immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
items.author: bbrowning

items.title: [Bug]: Agent enters infinite /approve exec loop, burning 965 API calls over 58 minutes
items.content:
## Bug type
Behavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)

## Beta release blocker
No

## Summary
When exec returns `approval-pending`, the agent attempts to resolve it by running `/approve <id> allow-always` via the `exec` tool instead of presenting it to the user. This triggers another `approval-pending`, creating an infinite loop. Observed: 965 `/approve` exec calls over 58 minutes, consuming significant API budget with no user-visible output.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Start OpenClaw with `google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` (or similar model).
2. Send a message that causes the agent to run an exec command requiring approval.
3. Observe: agent receives `approval-pending` from exec, then calls `exec` again with `/approve <id> allow-always` as the shell command.
4. This generates a new `approval-pending`, and the loop repeats indefinitely.

## Expected behavior
When exec returns `approval-pending`, the agent should present the `/approve <id> allow-once|allow-always|deny` command to the user as a chat message, and wait. The user sends the `/approve` reply, which is handled by the slash command handler — not by the exec tool.

## Actual behavior
The agent calls `exec` with `/approve <id> allow-always` as the shell command. The exec tool itself requires approval, generating a new `approval-pending`. The agent loops: 965 `/approve` exec calls observed over 58 minutes (09:54–10:52 CST), session file grew to 1.6MB, with no output to the user.

## Root cause (identified)
Two instructions in `src/agents/system-prompt.ts` conflict:

- Line 452: `"When a first-class tool exists for an action, use the tool directly instead of asking the user to run equivalent CLI or slash commands."`
- Line 453: `"When exec returns approval-pending, include the concrete /approve command from tool output (with allow-once|allow-always|deny) and do not ask for a different or rotated code."`

The model interprets "include" as "execute via exec tool" (following line 452's directive to use

items.title: [Bug]: sessions_spawn with runtime="subagent" does not respect agent's model.primary config
items.content:
### Bug type

Behavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)

### Beta release blocker

No

### Summary

**Bug Description**
When spawning a subagent using `sessions_spawn` with `runtime="subagent"`, 
the spawned session does not use the agent's configured `model.primary`, 
instead falling back to the global default model.

**Configuration**
```json
{
  "id": "sidekick",
  "name": "小跟班",
  "model": {
    "primary": "bailian/qwen3.5-plus"
  }
}

### Steps to reproduce

**Steps to reproduce:**


1. Configure an agent with a non-default model in `openclaw.json`:
   ```json
   {
     "id": "sidekick",
     "model": {
       "primary": "bailian/qwen3.5-plus"
     }
   }
   ```

2. Restart OpenClaw gateway to load the new configuration

3. Verify agent config shows correct model:
   ```bash
   openclaw agents list
   # Output shows: Model: bailian/qwen3.5-plus
   ```

4. Spawn a subagent using `sessions_spawn` with `runtime="subagent"`:
   ```json
   {
     "task": "Test task",
     "runtime": "subagent",
     "agentId": "sidekick"
     // Note: no "model" parameter specified
   }
   ```

5. Check the actual model used by the subagent:
   - Either via `subagents list` API
   - Or have the subagent report its model name

6. **Expected**: Subagent uses `bailian/qwen3.5-plus`
   
   **Actual**: Subagent uses global default `moonshot/kimi-k2.5`
```

---


```markdown
1. Configure agent "sidekick" with `model.primary: "bailian/qwen3.5-plus"`
2. Restart gateway
3. Spawn subagent: `sessions_spawn({runtime: "subagent", agentId: "sidekick", task: "..."})`
4. Observe subagent uses `moonshot/kimi-k2.5` instead of configured `bailian/qwen3.5-plus`
```



### Expected behavior

Subagent should use bailian/qwen3.5-plus as configured in agent's model.primary.

### Actual behavior

Subagent uses global default moonshot/kimi-k2.5.

### OpenClaw version

2026.3.24

### Operating system

Linux (WSL2)

### Install method

npm

### Model

moonshot/kimi-k2.5

### Provider / routing chain

items.title: feat(dingtalk): complete DingTalk channel — media, file send, reply fixes & benchmark
items.content:
## Summary

完成钉钉企业通道的全功能实现，包括多媒体收发、文件发送、回复路径修复，以及与 OpenClaw EC2 方案的端到端延迟对比 benchmark。

## Changes

### 1. DingTalk Adapter 全面重写（`adapters/dingtalk/index.ts`）

- **sendReply 增强**：
  - 新增 `resolveIsGroup()` —— SQS reply path 不携带 `dingtalkIsGroup`，改为从 DynamoDB Group 记录查询
  - 新增 `recoverSenderStaffId()` —— 从最近消息记录恢复 DM 发送者 staffId，解决 SQS 丢失上下文的问题
  - sessionWebhook 仅用于群聊快速通道（不再误用于 DM）
  - 增加 errcode 校验——钉钉 webhook 返回 HTTP 200 但 body 含错误码的边界场景
- **sendFile 完整实现**（之前只发文件名文本占位）：
  - MIME → mediaType 映射（image/file/audio/video）
  - `uploadMedia()` 上传 → `sendMediaMessage()` 发送
  - 支持 DM（userIds）和群聊（openConversationId）双路由
  - 可选附带 caption 文本消息
- **loadCredentials 提取**：统一凭证加载，sendReply 和 sendFile 复用

### 2. 多媒体消息收发 — Phase 2（`channels/dingtalk.ts`）

新增 4 个 API 函数：

| 函数 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `getOldAccessToken()` | 旧版 oapi token（媒体上传必需） |
| `uploadMedia()` | 文件上传获取 media_id（含 10MB/30MB 大小校验） |
| `sendMediaMessage()` | 通过 media_id 发送媒体消息（DM/群聊双路由） |
| `downloadMedia()` | 两步下载：downloadCode → presigned URL → 文件（含 HTTPS 升级、大小保护、MIME 推断） |

### 3. 入站消息处理增强（`message-handler.ts`）

- **支持 6 种消息类型**：text / richText / picture / file / audio / video（原来仅 text）
- **richText 解析**：提取文本 + 遍历 downloadCode/pictureDownloadCode 采集图片
- **媒体下载 pipeline**：downloadCode → downloadMedia → storeFromBuffer(S3) → attachments[]
- **内容标注**：为 Agent 附加文件描述（文件名、MIME），写入 DynamoDB Message 和 SQS Payload

### 4. Agent Runtime 工具链（`Dockerfile` + `package.json`）

- Dockerfile 新增 `pandoc` + `defusedxml`（文档处理能力）
- 全局安装 + 依赖声明 `docx@^9.0.0`（Excel/Word 生成，支持钉钉文件输出场景）

### 5. Benchmark 延迟分析报告（`docs/benchmark/`）

新增端到端延迟对比报告，对比：
- **方案 A**：钉钉 + Bedrock AgentCore + MiniMax M2.5（Serverless / nanoclaw）
- **方案 B**：Slack + OpenClaw + Claude Opus 4.6（EC2 自建）

核心结论：
- 两种架构延迟同一量级（25.4s vs 25.5s），差异 < 8%
- 92-98% 延迟来自模型推理，与部署架构无关
- Serverless 架构无额外延迟惩罚，消息链路 < 300ms

包含钉钉和 Slack 的实际对话测试截图。

### 6. 设计文档

- `docs/plans/2026-03-27-dingtalk-bugfix-enhancement-design.md` —— 完整设计 spec（452 行）

## Test Plan

- [x] 钉钉私聊文本消息收发
- [x] 钉钉群聊 @

## Action Required: Create GitHub Release v1.0.0

The codebase is production-ready and deployed. This issue tracks creating the formal GitHub release to unlock discoverability.

### Steps (2 minutes)

1. Go to **Releases** → **Draft a new release**
2. **Tag:** `v1.0.0` (create new tag on `main`)
3. **Title:** `v1.0.0 — OpenClaw Integrity Suite`
4. **Body:** Paste the release notes below
5. Click **Publish release**

### Release Notes

```markdown
# v1.0.0 — OpenClaw Integrity Suite

**The first revenue-gated MCP suite for agentic infrastructure.**

Four MCP servers solving the top four problems hitting vibe coders:

### 🔢 FinOps — Stops Cost Hallucinations
Verified pricing for AWS, GCP, and Azure. LLMs say RDS costs $15/mo — real price: $204.40. FinOps returns the real number.

### 🔌 API-Bridge — Stops API Fabrication
Fetches live OpenAPI/Swagger specs. No more agents inventing endpoints that don't exist.

### 🛡️ Guardrail — Stops Security Blindspots
Scans Terraform/CloudFormation for public S3 buckets, open SSH, unencrypted databases, and ghost costs — before `terraform apply`.

### 🔒 Fortress — Stops Ghost Costs
Zero-trust live state verification. Catches idle NAT gateways ($32/mo), oversized instances ($4,608/mo for a simple API), and drift.

---

## Quick Start (30 seconds)

Add to Claude Desktop (`claude_desktop_config.json`) or Cursor (`.cursor/mcp.json`):

\`\`\`json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "openclaw-finops": {
      "type": "streamable-http",
      "url": "https://openclaw-finops.marywomack.workers.dev/mcp",
      "headers": { "x-api-key": "YOUR_KEY" }
    }
  }
}
\`\`\`

**Free tier:** 25 ops/month. No credit card.
**Pro:** $29/mo (500 ops) | **Team:** $99/mo (2,000 ops) | **Enterprise:** $499/mo (50,000 ops)

MIT Licensed. Self-hostable.
```

---

### After Creating the Release

Complete the launch checklist in `LAUNCH_PLAN.md`:

- [ ] GitHub Release v1.0.0 published ← **this issue**
- [ ] Submit to Smithery.ai
- [ ] Submit to Glama.ai

items.author: maryadawson-code

items.title: [提效] Inline Self-Review Skill：为 OpenClaw Agent 添加内嵌自检能力
items.content:
## 背景

superpowers v5.0.6 的 inline self-review 模式是 verification-before-completion 的进化：不是等任务完成后才检查，而是在**完成的过程中内嵌自检步骤**。

核心区别：
- **旧模式**：实现 → 声称完成 → 发现问题 → 返工
- **Inline self-review**：实现 → 自检点 → 验证 → 完成（减少返工）

## 目标

在 OpenClaw Agent 中实现 **Inline Self-Review 技能**，要求 Agent 在关键节点主动暂停并自检：

```
实施流程:
1. [自检点] 代码写完后 — 运行 linter，报告问题
2. [自检点] 测试写完后 — 确认测试本身逻辑正确
3. [自检点] 功能完成后 — 验证符合原始需求
4. [自检点] Commit 前 — 最终确认无遗留问题
```

## 子任务

- [ ] 研究 superpowers inline self-review 具体实现（v5.0.6 changelog）
- [ ] 设计 OpenClaw Agent 的自检点触发时机
- [ ] 实现 self-review 提示词模板
- [ ] 与 subagent-driven-development skill 整合
- [ ] 测试验证：对比有/无 self-review 的任务完成质量

## 启发来源

- superpowers v5.0.6 changelog: 「inline self-review, brainstorm server restructure, owner-PID fixes」
- superpowers `skills/verification-before-completion/` — 铁律：evidence before claims

## 价值

减少返工率，提高一次性交付质量。特别适合长时间、多步骤的复杂任务。
items.author: ThomasLiu

items.title: Feature: Graceful Gateway Restart with Session Recovery
items.content:
## Problem

When the gateway restarts — whether from `openclaw gateway restart`, a config change, SIGUSR1, or a crash — all in-flight work is silently killed. There is no mechanism for sessions to know they were interrupted, no way for parent sessions to learn their subagents died, and no recovery path other than waiting for the next heartbeat or manual intervention.

This is the single biggest reliability gap in multi-agent OpenClaw deployments.

### What happens today

1. Gateway receives restart signal
2. Drain period begins (90s timeout)
3. Active sessions are killed after drain
4. Gateway comes back up — fresh slate
5. Sessions persist on disk (JSONL) but no one reads them
6. Subagents die without reporting back to parents
7. Cron jobs interrupted mid-execution are not retried until next scheduled time
8. Users in group chats see "read" receipts but never get responses

### Real-world impact

Running 7 agents across Discord + iMessage + cron, a single gateway restart can:

- Kill 3-4 active conversations simultaneously
- Orphan subagents mid-task (research, code generation, file operations)
- Drop cron jobs that were minutes into expensive multi-tool workflows
- Leave group chat messages permanently unanswered
- Break multi-step workflows where step N completed but step N+1 never fires

The blast radius scales with agent count. This is not a solo-agent problem.

### Existing community reports

- #51917 — Auto-resume unanswered sessions (27-agent Signal deployment)
- #30043 — Resume interrupted sessions and cron runs (macOS LaunchAgent)
- #4410 — Auto-restart on stuck sessions
- #43311 — Self-decapitation: agent-triggered restart kills its own session
- #43178 — Telegram watchdog triggers restart under 10-agent load

## Prior art: Hermes Agent

Hermes (Nous Research) is building this in their multi-agent architecture (issue #344):

- **Per-tool-call checkpointing** — Sub-agent state persisted to `~/.hermes/checkpoints/` after each tool call. On failure, resume f
items.author: lmdeagles

items.title: [提效] 引入 Verification-Gate Hooks：让 AI Coding 每一步都有证据支撑
items.content:
## 背景

obra/superpowers v5.0.6 的 verification-before-completion skill 核心原则是：**Evidence before claims, always**。该 skill 强制要求在声称工作完成前，必须运行验证命令并展示实际输出，而非依赖「应该没问题」的主观判断。

这对 AI Coding 场景尤为重要：AI Agent 经常在未充分验证的情况下声称「完成了」「测试通过了」，导致返工。

## 目标

构建 OpenClaw Hooks 驱动的 **Verification-Gate 机制**，在以下关键节点自动触发验证：

- `TaskComplete` hook: 要求 AI 必须展示实际测试/构建输出才能标记完成
- `CommitBefore` hook: 验证 git diff 和测试状态后才允许 commit
- `PRCreate` hook: 检查 CI 状态、测试覆盖率

## 子任务

- [ ] 研究 OpenClaw hooks 系统（已存在 hooks.json）
- [ ] 设计 Verification-Gate hook 触发条件（哪些节点必须验证）
- [ ] 实现通用的 evidence 提取工具（捕获命令输出、exit code）
- [ ] 与 superpowers verification-before-completion skill 对齐
- [ ] 编写测试用例验证 gate 有效性

## 启发来源

- superpowers: `skills/verification-before-completion/SKILL.md` — Iron Law: NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
- superpowers hooks 系统: `hooks/hooks.json` — SessionStart hook 示例

## 价值

减少因「未验证就声称完成」导致的返工，提高 AI Coding 输出可靠性。

items.title: feat: CI/CD release workflow + one-line skill installation
items.content:
## Summary

- **build.py**: exclude `__pycache__`/`.pyc`/`.DS_Store` from dist; add `--release VERSION` flag that generates tar.gz archives + `manifest.json` with sha256 checksums
- **GitHub Actions**: `.github/workflows/release.yml` triggers on `v*` tags, builds all skill packages, uploads to GitHub Release
- **install.sh**: one-line installer — `curl | bash` downloads manifest, verifies sha256, extracts to platform-specific directory (Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw)
- **INSTALL.md**: agent-focused installation guide, designed to be read and executed directly by AI agents
- **README.md**: updated with install instructions and release workflow docs

## Test plan

- [x] `python3 build.py --release 0.1.0` produces 4 tar.gz + manifest.json
- [x] Archives contain no `__pycache__`, `.pyc`, or `.DS_Store`
- [x] manifest.json has correct structure with 64-char sha256 hashes
- [x] `bash -n install.sh` passes syntax check
- [x] release.yml references correct build command and action

items.title: Docs: restructure and condense README into clear project overview and quickstart
items.content:
### Motivation

- Consolidate and simplify the project's top-level documentation into a clear, navigable overview of the repository and core components.  
- Remove overly long narrative and duplicate lists in favor of concise component summaries and actionable quickstart instructions.  
- Make it easier for developers to find runtime, dashboard, and agent usage notes and commands without scanning many sections.

### Description

- Rewrote `README.md` to a shorter, structured overview that highlights the main modules: `lobster/`, `mission-control/`, `agent/`, `agi-agent/`, and the `.openclaw/workspace/` layout.  
- Consolidated the Lobster runtime documentation into a focused summary of features (JSON-first pipelines, approval gates, resume tokens) and added quick usage examples including `pnpm test` and runtime invocation like `node ./bin/lobster.js`.  
- Added succinct run/install steps and API endpoint references for `mission-control/`, and summarized the autonomous loop behavior in `agent/` and procurement flow in `agi-agent/`.  
- Included operational notes such as the hidden workspace path `.openclaw/workspace` and a statement that `agent/abi-registry.js` is not present in this snapshot.

### Testing

- This change is documentation-only and did not modify executable code, so no automated tests were executed as part of this change.  
- Existing test commands remain documented (`cd lobster && pnpm test` and `cd mission-control && npm run lint && npm run build`).  
- No test failures were reported because no test suite was run for the doc update.

------

items.title: feat(tasks): add status health and maintenance command
items.content:
## Summary

- Problem: the new SQLite-backed task ledger can be audited, but operators still have to remember a separate command and there is no shared repair path for obviously broken rows.
- Why it matters: task health stays out of the main status surface, and cleanup drift on restored terminal rows remains visible but not fixable from the CLI.
- What changed: added task audit health to `openclaw status`, added `openclaw tasks maintenance` with preview/apply modes, and taught maintenance to stamp missing cleanup retention on terminal rows before pruning.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no new task metadata model, no executor/retry semantics, no Redis/Temporal work.

## Change Type (select all)

- [x] Feature
- [x] Refactor required for the fix

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [x] Memory / storage
- [x] UI / DX

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #57361
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause / Regression History (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A
- Missing detection / guardrail: N/A
- Prior context (`git blame`, prior PR, issue, or refactor if known): follow-up to the SQLite task ledger and audit work in #57361.
- Why this regressed now: N/A
- If unknown, what was ruled out: N/A

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [x] Unit test
  - [x] Seam / integration test
- Target test or file: `src/commands/status.summary.test.ts`, `src/commands/tasks.test.ts`, `src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.test.ts`, `src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts`
- Scenario the test should lock in: status includes task audit health, the new maintenance command is wired correctly, and maintenance can preview/apply cleanup stamping for legacy terminal rows.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: these flows are pure command/registry seams without needing broader end-to-end coverage.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any): existing task registry test

items.title: [想法] 引入 omega-memory 构建 Agent 持久化记忆系统
items.content:
## 背景

everything-claude-code 最新合并了 **omega-memory** MCP server（PR #854），这是一个基于 PyPI 的持久化记忆系统，支持：
- 语义搜索（semantic search）
- 多 Agent 协同（multi-agent coordination）
- 知识图谱（knowledge graphs）

当前 OpenClaw Agent 的记忆机制薄弱，session 之间无法共享上下文。

## 目标

为 OpenClaw 引入持久化记忆层，让 Agent 具备跨 session 的知识积累能力。

## 子任务

- [ ] 评估 omega-memory 与 OpenClaw 的集成可行性
- [ ] 设计 OpenClaw 的记忆 schema（短期/中期/长期）
- [ ] 实现 MCP server 集成到 OpenClaw
- [ ] 验证语义搜索效果

## 参考

- omega-memory: https://github.com/omega-memory/omega-memory
- MCP 配置示例: ~/Projects/everything-claude-code/mcp-configs/mcp-servers.json

items.title: Add comprehensive Harness Engineering prototype design document for 6G Core Agent development
items.content:
Creates `docs/prototype-design.md` — a full prototype design covering the end-to-end lifecycle of 6G Core Network Agent application software under the Harness Engineering paradigm, across seven dimensions.

## Structure

### 一、洞察 (Insights)
- **编程Agent对比**: Side-by-side table of Claude Code / OpenAI Codex / Microsoft Copilot / Cursor across Harness layer, autonomy, context window, multi-agent, and differentiation
- **OpenClaw洞察**: Deep analysis of four key differentiators — model decoupling, Harness runtime competitive moat, Skills-based capability extension, and Skills as a model capability transfer path (vs. traditional distillation); with data points (e.g., Toolformer: 6.7B model outperforms 175B GPT-3 via tool use)
- **Harness Engineering趋势**: Industry definition, reference architecture, impact on SDLC, challenge breakdown per dimension (Context/Skills/Evals/Sandbox), and key reusable DNA from production deployments

### 二、架构 (Architecture)
- **Cloud Native vs AI Native**: Three comparison tables — definitions (CNCF/AWS/Alibaba/Huawei), architecture characteristics, and 12 Factors extension; each row includes a "key change" column
- **6G核心网架构**: 5GC reference (3GPP TS 23.501) → 6G evolution diagram showing: multimodal intent as new UE input, System Agent (intent engine) as first-hop, Connection Agent wrapping legacy NFs (AMF/SMF/UPF) via Tools/MCP, Beyond-Connection Agent for new services, all over ACN (Agent Connection Network)
- **6G典型UC**: Three tiers — basic connectivity enhancement, intent-driven connectivity, beyond-connectivity new services — with KPI targets, challenges, and spec links
- **AI Native平台分层架构**: Full layered diagram (Agent platform / Model inference platform / Domain cloud-native / Telco cloud), platform Agents for full dev lifecycle, Agent Harness runtime self-evolution loop

### 三–七、开发 / 测试 / 部署 / 运行 / 运维
Each section follows a consistent pattern:
- **洞察**: Mode comparison (traditional → AI-assisted → Harness Engineering), business demand

Bumps [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) from 2026.3.24 to 2026.3.28.
Release notes

Sourced from openclaw/openclaw's releases.

openclaw 2026.3.28

Breaking

  • Providers/Qwen: remove the deprecated qwen-portal-auth OAuth integration for portal.qwen.ai; migrate to Model Studio with openclaw onboard --auth-choice modelstudio-api-key. (#52709) Thanks @​pomelo-nwu.
  • Config/Doctor: drop automatic config migrations older than two months; very old legacy keys now fail validation instead of being rewritten on load or by openclaw doctor.

Changes

  • xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, add first-class x_search, and auto-enable the xAI plugin from owned web-search and tool config so bundled Grok auth/configured search flows work without manual plugin toggles. (#56048) Thanks @​huntharo.
  • xAI/onboarding: let the bundled Grok web-search plugin offer optional x_search setup during openclaw onboard and openclaw configure --section web, including an x_search model picker with the shared xAI key.
  • MiniMax: add image generation provider for image-01 model, supporting generate and image-to-image editing with aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @​liyuan97.
  • Plugins/hooks: add async requireApproval to before_tool_call hooks

items.content:
# OpenClaw 生态日报 2026-03-30

> Issues: 500 | PRs: 500 | 覆盖项目: 12 个 | 生成时间: 2026-03-30 02:15 UTC

- [OpenClaw](https://github​.com/openclaw/openclaw)

- [ZeptoClaw](https://github​.com/qhkm/zeptoclaw)
- [EasyClaw](https://github​.com/gaoyangz77/easyclaw)

---

## OpenClaw 项目深度报告

**OpenClaw 项目动态日报（2026-03-30）**

---

### 1. **今日速览**
过去24小时，OpenClaw 社区活跃度极高，共处理 Issue 更新 500 条、PR 更新 500 条，表明开发者和用户高度参与。项目整体运行平稳，无新版本发布，但修复类 PR 和回归问题集中出现，反映近期版本（如 2026.3.x）存在较多稳定性挑战。社区对跨平台支持（Linux/Windows）和内存管理（QMD）的关注度显著上升。

---

### 2. **版本发布**
无新版本发布。

---

### 3. **项目进展**
今日合并或关闭的重要 PR 包括：
- **#57400**：修复 `openclaw status` 中缓存命中率显示异常（因 legacy session 的 totalTokens 过小导致 >100%），提升 CLI 工具可靠性。
- **#57217**：新增“孤儿会话键迁移”功能，在网关启动时自动清理无效会话别名，改善升级兼容性。
- **#54856**：序列化共享 OAuth 令牌刷新逻辑，解决多并发请求下的 race condition 问题（相关 Issue #26322）。
- **#57359**：修复 exec 异步审批在纯 webchat 会话中的交付失败问题，增强 exec 工具在复杂部署场景下的可用性。

这些改进主要集中在网关稳定性、CLI 体验和认证流程优化上，体现了项目向生产就绪方向稳步演进。

---

### 4. **社区热点**
最活跃的 Issue 集中于以下方面：
- **#75 Linux/Windows Clawdbot Apps**（60 评论，66 赞）：用户强烈呼吁推出原生 Linux 和 Windows 应用，以匹配现有 macOS/iOS/Android 生态。此需求长期存在，预计将成为未来平台扩展路线图的核心议题。
- **#53353 Matrix E2EE 失效**（14 评论）：v2026.3.23 后 WASM 文件缺失导致加密通信中断，影响企业级安全部署。已有初步排查但未闭环，需紧急修复。
- **#49191 Google Vertex ADC 认证失败**（13 评论）：ADC 模式被错误识别为 API key，引发 401 错误。此问题阻碍云原生集成，亟需身份验证层重构。

此外，**#52951 tools.fs.roots**（新 PR，XL 级）提出 per-agent 文件系统根目录控制机制，获得广泛期待，预示下一版本将强化细粒度权限管理。

---

### 5. **Bug 与稳定性**
按严重程度排序的关键 Bug：
1. **高优先级**：
   - **#53353**：Matrix E2EE 因缺失 WASM 文件完全失效（v2026.3.23 引入）。✅ 有潜在修复方向（WASM 打包检查），尚无 PR。
   - **#4
